001package sting.processor;
002
003import java.io.IOException;
004import java.lang.annotation.Retention;
005import java.util.ArrayList;
006import java.util.Arrays;
007import java.util.Collection;
008import java.util.Collections;
009import java.util.EnumMap;
010import java.util.HashMap;
011import java.util.HashSet;
012import java.util.LinkedHashMap;
013import java.util.List;
014import java.util.Map;
015import java.util.Objects;
016import java.util.ServiceLoader;
017import java.util.Set;
018import java.util.Stack;
019import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean;
020import java.util.function.Predicate;
021import java.util.stream.Collectors;
022import javax.annotation.Nonnull;
023import javax.annotation.Nullable;
024import javax.annotation.processing.ProcessingEnvironment;
025import javax.annotation.processing.RoundEnvironment;
026import javax.annotation.processing.SupportedAnnotationTypes;
027import javax.annotation.processing.SupportedOptions;
028import javax.annotation.processing.SupportedSourceVersion;
029import javax.lang.model.AnnotatedConstruct;
030import javax.lang.model.SourceVersion;
031import javax.lang.model.element.AnnotationMirror;
032import javax.lang.model.element.AnnotationValue;
033import javax.lang.model.element.Element;
034import javax.lang.model.element.ElementKind;
035import javax.lang.model.element.ExecutableElement;
036import javax.lang.model.element.Modifier;
037import javax.lang.model.element.TypeElement;
038import javax.lang.model.element.VariableElement;
039import javax.lang.model.type.DeclaredType;
040import javax.lang.model.type.ExecutableType;
041import javax.lang.model.type.TypeKind;
042import javax.lang.model.type.TypeMirror;
043import javax.lang.model.util.Elements;
044import javax.tools.Diagnostic;
045import org.realityforge.proton.AbstractStandardProcessor;
046import org.realityforge.proton.AnnotationsUtil;
047import org.realityforge.proton.DeferredElementSet;
048import org.realityforge.proton.ElementsUtil;
049import org.realityforge.proton.GeneratorUtil;
050import org.realityforge.proton.JsonUtil;
051import org.realityforge.proton.MemberChecks;
052import org.realityforge.proton.ProcessorException;
053import org.realityforge.proton.ResourceUtil;
054import org.realityforge.proton.StopWatch;
055import org.realityforge.proton.SuperficialValidation;
056import org.realityforge.proton.TypesUtil;
057
058/**
059 * The annotation processor that analyzes Sting annotated source code and generates an injector and supporting artifacts.
060 */
061@SuppressWarnings( "DuplicatedCode" )
062@SupportedAnnotationTypes( { Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
063                             Constants.INJECTOR_FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
064                             Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
065                             Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
066                             Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
067                             Constants.EAGER_CLASSNAME,
068                             Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME,
069                             Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME,
070                             Constants.STING_PROVIDER_CLASSNAME,
071                             Constants.ACT_AS_STING_CONSUMER_CLASSNAME,
072                             Constants.ACT_AS_STING_PROVIDER_CLASSNAME,
073                             Constants.ACT_AS_STING_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME } )
074@SupportedSourceVersion( SourceVersion.RELEASE_17 )
075@SupportedOptions( { "sting.defer.unresolved",
076                     "sting.defer.errors",
077                     "sting.debug",
078                     "sting.format_generated_source",
079                     "sting.profile",
080                     "sting.emit_json_descriptors",
081                     "sting.emit_dot_reports",
082                     "sting.verbose_out_of_round.errors",
083                     "sting.warnings_as_errors" } )
084public final class StingProcessor
085  extends AbstractStandardProcessor
086{
087  private enum AnnotationUsageKind
088  {
089    PROCESSED,
090    SILENT_INTEGRATION_EXCEPTION,
091    INVALID
092  }
093
094  /**
095   * Extension for json descriptors.
096   */
097  static final String JSON_SUFFIX = ".sting.json";
098  /**
099   * Extension for graphviz .dot reports.
100   */
101  static final String DOT_SUFFIX = ".gv";
102  // Binary descriptor persistence removed
103  /**
104   * Extension for the computed graph descriptor.
105   */
106  static final String GRAPH_SUFFIX = "__ObjectGraph" + JSON_SUFFIX;
107  /**
108   * A local cache of bindings that is cleared on error or when processing is complete.
109   * This will probably be loaded from json cache files in the future but now we require
110   * in memory processing.
111   */
112  @Nonnull
113  private final Registry _registry = new Registry();
114  @Nonnull
115  private final DeferredElementSet _deferredInjectableTypes = new DeferredElementSet();
116  @Nonnull
117  private final DeferredElementSet _deferredFragmentTypes = new DeferredElementSet();
118  @Nonnull
119  private final DeferredElementSet _deferredFactoryTypes = new DeferredElementSet();
120  @Nonnull
121  private final DeferredElementSet _deferredInjectorTypes = new DeferredElementSet();
122  @Nonnull
123  private final DeferredElementSet _deferredInjectorFragmentTypes = new DeferredElementSet();
124  @Nonnull
125  private final StopWatch _analyzeInjectableStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Analyze Injectable" );
126  @Nonnull
127  private final StopWatch _analyzeFragmentStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Analyze Fragment" );
128  @Nonnull
129  private final StopWatch _analyzeFactoryStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Analyze Factory" );
130  @Nonnull
131  private final StopWatch _analyzeInjectorFragmentStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Analyze Injector Fragment" );
132  @Nonnull
133  private final StopWatch _analyzeInjectorStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Analyze Injector" );
134  private final StopWatch _generateInjectableStubStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Generate Injectable Stub" );
135  @Nonnull
136  private final StopWatch _generateFragmentStubStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Generate Fragment Stub" );
137  @Nonnull
138  private final StopWatch _generateFactoryImplStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Generate Factory Impl" );
139  @Nonnull
140  private final StopWatch _generateInjectorImplStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Generate Injector Impl" );
141  @Nonnull
142  private final StopWatch _isInjectorResolvedStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Is Injector Resolved" );
143  @Nonnull
144  private final StopWatch _buildAndEmitObjectGraphStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Build and Emit Object Graph" );
145  /**
146   * Flag controlling whether json descriptors are emitted.
147   * Json descriptors are primarily used during debugging and probably should not be enabled in production code.
148   */
149  private boolean _emitJsonDescriptors;
150  /**
151   * Flag controlling whether .dot formatted report is emitted.
152   * The .dot report is typically used by end users who want to explore the graph.
153   */
154  private boolean _emitDotReports;
155  /**
156   * Cache of derived fragment descriptors during a processing session.
157   */
158  @Nonnull
159  private final Map<String, FragmentDescriptor> _derivedFragmentCache = new HashMap<>();
160  /**
161   * Cache of derived injectable descriptors during a processing session.
162   */
163  @Nonnull
164  private final Map<String, InjectableDescriptor> _derivedInjectableCache = new HashMap<>();
165  /**
166   * Track fragments that are currently being resolved to break include cycles.
167   */
168  @Nonnull
169  private final Set<String> _resolvingFragmentTypes = new HashSet<>();
170  @Nullable
171  private final List<InterceptorCodeGenerator> _suppliedInterceptorCodeGenerators;
172  @Nonnull
173  private List<InterceptorCodeGenerator> _interceptorCodeGenerators = Collections.emptyList();
174
175  public StingProcessor()
176  {
177    this( null );
178  }
179
180  StingProcessor( @Nullable final List<InterceptorCodeGenerator> interceptorCodeGenerators )
181  {
182    _suppliedInterceptorCodeGenerators = null == interceptorCodeGenerators ?
183                                         null :
184                                         List.copyOf( interceptorCodeGenerators );
185  }
186
187  @Nonnull
188  @Override
189  protected String getIssueTrackerURL()
190  {
191    return "https://github.com/sting-ioc/sting/issues";
192  }
193
194  @Nonnull
195  @Override
196  protected String getOptionPrefix()
197  {
198    return "sting";
199  }
200
201  @Override
202  public synchronized void init( @Nonnull final ProcessingEnvironment processingEnv )
203  {
204    super.init( processingEnv );
205    _emitJsonDescriptors = readBooleanOption( "emit_json_descriptors", false );
206    _emitDotReports = readBooleanOption( "emit_dot_reports", false );
207    _interceptorCodeGenerators = null != _suppliedInterceptorCodeGenerators ?
208                                 _suppliedInterceptorCodeGenerators :
209                                 ServiceLoader
210                                   .load( InterceptorCodeGenerator.class, getClass().getClassLoader() )
211                                   .stream()
212                                   .map( ServiceLoader.Provider::get )
213                                   .toList();
214  }
215
216  @Override
217  protected void collectStopWatches( @Nonnull final Collection<StopWatch> stopWatches )
218  {
219    stopWatches.add( _analyzeInjectableStopWatch );
220    stopWatches.add( _analyzeFragmentStopWatch );
221    stopWatches.add( _analyzeFactoryStopWatch );
222    stopWatches.add( _analyzeInjectorFragmentStopWatch );
223    stopWatches.add( _analyzeInjectorStopWatch );
224    stopWatches.add( _generateInjectableStubStopWatch );
225    stopWatches.add( _generateFragmentStubStopWatch );
226    stopWatches.add( _generateFactoryImplStopWatch );
227    stopWatches.add( _generateInjectorImplStopWatch );
228    stopWatches.add( _isInjectorResolvedStopWatch );
229    stopWatches.add( _buildAndEmitObjectGraphStopWatch );
230  }
231
232  @Override
233  public boolean process( @Nonnull final Set<? extends TypeElement> annotations, @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env )
234  {
235    debugAnnotationProcessingRootElements( env );
236    collectRootTypeNames( env );
237
238    processTypeElements( annotations,
239                         env,
240                         Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
241                         _deferredFactoryTypes,
242                         "Analyze Factory",
243                         this::processFactory,
244                         _analyzeFactoryStopWatch );
245
246    processTypeElements( annotations,
247                         env,
248                         Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
249                         _deferredInjectableTypes,
250                         "Analyze Injectable",
251                         this::processInjectable,
252                         _analyzeInjectableStopWatch );
253
254    processTypeElements( annotations,
255                         env,
256                         Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
257                         _deferredFragmentTypes,
258                         "Analyze Fragment",
259                         this::processFragment,
260                         _analyzeFragmentStopWatch );
261
262    annotations
263      .stream()
264      .filter( a -> a.getQualifiedName().toString().equals( Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME ) )
265      .findAny()
266      .ifPresent( a -> verifyNamedElements( env, env.getElementsAnnotatedWith( a ) ) );
267
268    annotations
269      .stream()
270      .filter( a -> a.getQualifiedName().toString().equals( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) )
271      .findAny()
272      .ifPresent( a -> verifyTypedElements( env, env.getElementsAnnotatedWith( a ) ) );
273
274    annotations.stream()
275      .filter( a -> a.getQualifiedName().toString().equals( Constants.EAGER_CLASSNAME ) )
276      .findAny()
277      .ifPresent( a -> verifyEagerElements( env, env.getElementsAnnotatedWith( a ) ) );
278
279    processTypeElements( annotations,
280                         env,
281                         Constants.INJECTOR_FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
282                         _deferredInjectorFragmentTypes,
283                         "Analyze Injector Fragment",
284                         this::processInjectorFragment,
285                         _analyzeInjectorFragmentStopWatch );
286
287    processTypeElements( annotations,
288                         env,
289                         Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
290                         _deferredInjectorTypes,
291                         "Analyze Injector",
292                         this::processInjector,
293                         _analyzeInjectorStopWatch );
294
295    processResolvedFactories( env );
296    processResolvedInjectables( env );
297    processResolvedFragments( env );
298    processResolvedInjectors( env );
299
300    errorIfProcessingOverAndInvalidTypesDetected( env );
301    errorIfProcessingOverAndUnprocessedInjectorDetected( env );
302    if ( env.processingOver() || env.errorRaised() )
303    {
304      _registry.clear();
305      _derivedFragmentCache.clear();
306      _derivedInjectableCache.clear();
307    }
308    clearRootTypeNamesIfProcessingOver( env );
309    reportProfilerTimings();
310    return true;
311  }
312
313  private void errorIfProcessingOverAndUnprocessedInjectorDetected( @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env )
314  {
315    if ( env.processingOver() && !env.errorRaised() )
316    {
317      final List<InjectorDescriptor> injectors = _registry.getInjectors();
318      if ( !injectors.isEmpty() )
319      {
320        processingEnv
321          .getMessager()
322          .printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.ERROR,
323                         getClass().getSimpleName() + " failed to process " + injectors.size() + " injectors " +
324                         "as not all of their dependencies could be resolved. Ensure that included types are " +
325                         "present on the classpath and are valid Sting components. If the problem is not " +
326                         "obvious, consider passing the annotation option sting.debug=true" );
327        for ( final InjectorDescriptor injector : injectors )
328        {
329          processingEnv
330            .getMessager()
331            .printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.ERROR,
332                           "Failed to process the " + injector.getElement().getQualifiedName() + " injector." );
333        }
334      }
335    }
336  }
337
338  private void processResolvedInjectables( @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env )
339  {
340    for ( final InjectableDescriptor injectable : new ArrayList<>( _registry.getInjectables() ) )
341    {
342      if ( !injectable.isJavaStubGenerated() )
343      {
344        performAction( env, "Generate Injectable Stub", e -> {
345          injectable.markJavaStubAsGenerated();
346          emitInjectableJsonDescriptor( injectable );
347          emitInjectableStub( injectable );
348        }, injectable.getElement(), _generateInjectableStubStopWatch );
349      }
350    }
351  }
352
353  private void processResolvedFactories( @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env )
354  {
355    for ( final FactoryDescriptor factory : new ArrayList<>( _registry.getFactories() ) )
356    {
357      if ( !factory.isGenerated() )
358      {
359        performAction( env, "Generate Factory Impl", e -> {
360          factory.markGenerated();
361          emitFactoryImpl( factory );
362        }, factory.getElement(), _generateFactoryImplStopWatch );
363      }
364    }
365  }
366
367  private void emitFactoryImpl( @Nonnull final FactoryDescriptor factory )
368    throws IOException
369  {
370    debug( () -> "Emitting factory implementation for the factory " + factory.getElement().getQualifiedName() );
371    final String packageName = GeneratorUtil.getQualifiedPackageName( factory.getElement() );
372    emitTypeSpec( packageName, FactoryGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, factory ) );
373  }
374
375  private void emitInjectableStub( @Nonnull final InjectableDescriptor injectable )
376    throws IOException
377  {
378    debug( () -> "Emitting injectable stub for the injectable " + injectable.getElement().getQualifiedName() );
379    final String packageName = GeneratorUtil.getQualifiedPackageName( injectable.getElement() );
380    emitTypeSpec( packageName, InjectableGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, injectable ) );
381  }
382
383  private void processResolvedFragments( @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env )
384  {
385    final List<FragmentDescriptor> deferred = new ArrayList<>();
386    final List<FragmentDescriptor> current = new ArrayList<>( _registry.getFragments() );
387    final AtomicBoolean resolvedType = new AtomicBoolean();
388
389    while ( !current.isEmpty() )
390    {
391      for ( final FragmentDescriptor fragment : current )
392      {
393        if ( !fragment.isJavaStubGenerated() && !fragment.containsError() )
394        {
395          performAction( env, "Generate Fragment Stub", e -> {
396            final ResolveType resolveType = isFragmentResolved( env, fragment );
397            if ( ResolveType.RESOLVED == resolveType )
398            {
399              fragment.markJavaStubAsGenerated();
400              emitFragmentJsonDescriptor( fragment );
401              emitFragmentStub( fragment );
402            }
403            else if ( ResolveType.MAYBE_UNRESOLVED == resolveType )
404            {
405              debug( () -> "The fragment " + fragment.getElement().getQualifiedName() +
406                           " has resolved java types but unresolved descriptors. Deferring processing " +
407                           "until later in the round" );
408              deferred.add( fragment );
409            }
410            else
411            {
412              debug( () -> "Defer generation for the fragment " + fragment.getElement().getQualifiedName() +
413                           " as it is not yet resolved" );
414            }
415          }, fragment.getElement(), _generateFragmentStubStopWatch );
416        }
417      }
418      current.clear();
419      if ( resolvedType.get() )
420      {
421        current.addAll( deferred );
422        deferred.clear();
423      }
424      else
425      {
426        break;
427      }
428    }
429  }
430
431  @Nonnull
432  private ResolveType isFragmentReady( @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env,
433                                       @Nonnull final FragmentDescriptor fragment )
434  {
435    if ( fragment.containsError() )
436    {
437      return ResolveType.UNRESOLVED;
438    }
439    else
440    {
441      return isFragmentResolved( env, fragment );
442    }
443  }
444
445  private void emitFragmentStub( @Nonnull final FragmentDescriptor fragment )
446    throws IOException
447  {
448    debug( () -> "Emitting fragment stub for the fragment " + fragment.getElement().getQualifiedName() );
449    final String packageName = GeneratorUtil.getQualifiedPackageName( fragment.getElement() );
450    emitTypeSpec( packageName, FragmentGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, fragment ) );
451  }
452
453  private void processResolvedInjectors( @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env )
454  {
455    final boolean profileEnabled = isProfileEnabled();
456
457    final List<InjectorDescriptor> deferred = new ArrayList<>();
458    final List<InjectorDescriptor> current = new ArrayList<>( _registry.getInjectors() );
459    final AtomicBoolean resolvedType = new AtomicBoolean();
460
461    while ( !current.isEmpty() )
462    {
463      for ( final InjectorDescriptor injector : current )
464      {
465        if ( !injector.containsError() )
466        {
467          performAction( env, "Generate Injector Impl", e -> {
468            if ( profileEnabled )
469            {
470              _isInjectorResolvedStopWatch.start();
471            }
472            final ResolveType resolveType = isInjectorResolved( env, injector );
473            if ( profileEnabled )
474            {
475              _isInjectorResolvedStopWatch.stop();
476            }
477            if ( ResolveType.RESOLVED == resolveType )
478            {
479              _registry.deregisterInjector( injector );
480              if ( profileEnabled )
481              {
482                _buildAndEmitObjectGraphStopWatch.start();
483              }
484              try
485              {
486                buildAndEmitObjectGraph( injector );
487              }
488              finally
489              {
490                if ( profileEnabled )
491                {
492                  _buildAndEmitObjectGraphStopWatch.stop();
493                }
494              }
495              resolvedType.set( true );
496            }
497            else if ( ResolveType.MAYBE_UNRESOLVED == resolveType )
498            {
499              debug( () -> "The injector " + injector.getElement().getQualifiedName() +
500                           " has resolved java types but unresolved descriptors. Deferring processing " +
501                           "until later in the round" );
502              deferred.add( injector );
503            }
504            else
505            {
506              debug( () -> "Defer generation for the injector " + injector.getElement().getQualifiedName() +
507                           " as it is not yet resolved" );
508            }
509          }, injector.getElement(), _generateInjectorImplStopWatch );
510        }
511      }
512      current.clear();
513      if ( resolvedType.get() )
514      {
515        resolvedType.set( false );
516        current.addAll( deferred );
517        deferred.clear();
518      }
519      else
520      {
521        break;
522      }
523    }
524  }
525
526  private void buildAndEmitObjectGraph( @Nonnull final InjectorDescriptor injector )
527    throws Exception
528  {
529    debug( () -> "Preparing to build component graph for the injector " + injector.getElement().getQualifiedName() );
530    final ComponentGraph graph = new ComponentGraph( injector, _registry );
531    registerIncludesComponents( graph );
532
533    registerInputs( graph );
534
535    debug( () -> "Building component graph for the injector " + injector.getElement().getQualifiedName() );
536
537    buildObjectGraphNodes( graph );
538
539    if ( graph.getNodes().isEmpty() && graph.getRootNode().getDependsOn().isEmpty() )
540    {
541      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME ) + " target " +
542                                    "produced an empty object graph. This means that there are no eager nodes " +
543                                    "in the includes and there are no dependencies or only unsatisfied optional " +
544                                    "dependencies defined by the injector",
545                                    graph.getInjector().getElement() );
546    }
547
548    debug( () -> "Propagating eager-ness for the injector " + injector.getElement().getQualifiedName() );
549
550    propagateEagerFlagUpstream( graph );
551
552    debug( () -> "Verifying no circular dependencies for the injector " + injector.getElement().getQualifiedName() );
553
554    CircularDependencyChecker.verifyNoCircularDependencyLoops( graph );
555
556    final Set<Binding> actualBindings =
557      graph.getNodes()
558        .stream()
559        .filter( Node::isBinding )
560        .map( Node::getBinding )
561        .collect( Collectors.toSet() );
562
563    for ( final Map.Entry<IncludeDescriptor, Set<Binding>> entry : graph.getIncludeRootToBindingMap().entrySet() )
564    {
565      if ( entry.getValue().stream().noneMatch( actualBindings::contains ) )
566      {
567        final IncludeDescriptor includeRoot = entry.getKey();
568        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME ) + " must not " +
569                                      "include type " + includeRoot.includedType() +
570                                      " when the type is not used within the graph",
571                                      graph.getInjector().getElement() );
572      }
573    }
574
575    emitObjectGraphJsonDescriptor( graph );
576    emitInterceptorProxies( graph );
577
578    final String packageName = GeneratorUtil.getQualifiedPackageName( graph.getInjector().getElement() );
579
580    debug( () -> "Emitting injector implementation for the injector " +
581                 graph.getInjector().getElement().getQualifiedName() );
582    emitTypeSpec( packageName, InjectorGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, graph ) );
583
584    if ( injector.isInjectable() )
585    {
586      debug( () -> "Emitting injector provider for the injector " +
587                   graph.getInjector().getElement().getQualifiedName() );
588      emitTypeSpec( packageName, InjectorProviderGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, graph ) );
589    }
590    emitDotReport( graph );
591  }
592
593  private void emitInterceptorProxies( @Nonnull final ComponentGraph graph )
594    throws IOException
595  {
596    for ( final Node node : graph.getNodes() )
597    {
598      if ( node.isProxy() )
599      {
600        final InterceptorProxyDescriptor proxy = node.getProxy();
601        if ( !proxy.isGenerated() )
602        {
603          proxy.markGenerated();
604          emitTypeSpec( proxy.getClassName().packageName(),
605                        InterceptorProxyGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, proxy, _interceptorCodeGenerators ) );
606        }
607      }
608    }
609  }
610
611  private void emitDotReport( @Nonnull final ComponentGraph graph )
612    throws IOException
613  {
614    if ( _emitDotReports )
615    {
616      final TypeElement element = graph.getInjector().getElement();
617      final String filename = toFilename( element ) + DOT_SUFFIX;
618      debug( () -> "Emitting .dot report for the injector " + graph.getInjector().getElement().getQualifiedName() );
619
620      final String report = InjectorDotReportGenerator.buildDotReport( processingEnv, graph );
621      ResourceUtil.writeResource( processingEnv, filename, report, element );
622    }
623  }
624
625  private void registerInputs( @Nonnull final ComponentGraph graph )
626  {
627    for ( final InputDescriptor input : graph.getInjector().getInputs() )
628    {
629      graph.registerInput( input );
630    }
631  }
632
633  private void propagateEagerFlagUpstream( @Nonnull final ComponentGraph graph )
634  {
635    // Propagate Eager flag to all dependencies of eager nodes breaking the propagation at Supplier nodes
636    // They may not be configured as eager but they are effectively eager given that they will be created
637    // at startup, they may as well be marked as eager objects as that results in smaller code-size.
638    graph.getNodes().stream().filter( Node::isDeclaredEager ).forEach( Node::markNodeAndUpstreamAsEager );
639  }
640
641  private void registerIncludesComponents( @Nonnull final ComponentGraph graph )
642  {
643    registerIncludes( graph, null, graph.getInjector().getIncludes() );
644  }
645
646  private void registerIncludes( @Nonnull final ComponentGraph graph,
647                                 @Nullable final IncludeDescriptor includeRoot,
648                                 @Nonnull final Collection<IncludeDescriptor> includes )
649  {
650    for ( final IncludeDescriptor include : includes )
651    {
652      final String classname = include.actualTypeName();
653      if ( isDebugEnabled() && include.isProvider() )
654      {
655        debug( () -> "Registering include " + classname + " via provider " + include.includedType() +
656                     " into graph " + graph.getInjector().getElement().getQualifiedName() );
657      }
658      else
659      {
660        debug( () -> "Registering include " + classname + " into graph " +
661                     graph.getInjector().getElement().getQualifiedName() );
662      }
663      final IncludeDescriptor root = null == includeRoot ? include : includeRoot;
664      final TypeElement element = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( classname );
665      assert null != element;
666      final String qualifiedName = element.getQualifiedName().toString();
667      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) )
668      {
669        final FragmentDescriptor fragment = _registry.getFragmentByClassName( qualifiedName );
670        registerIncludes( graph, root, fragment.getIncludes() );
671        graph.registerFragment( root, fragment );
672      }
673      else
674      {
675        assert AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME );
676        final InjectableDescriptor injectable = _registry.getInjectableByClassName( qualifiedName );
677        graph.registerInjectable( root, injectable );
678      }
679    }
680  }
681
682  private void buildObjectGraphNodes( @Nonnull final ComponentGraph graph )
683  {
684    final Set<Node> completed = new HashSet<>();
685    final Stack<WorkEntry> workList = new Stack<>();
686    // At this stage the "rootNode" contains dependencies for all the output methods declared on the injector
687    // and all the eager services declared in includes have already been added to the nodes list.
688    //
689    // We start at the rootNode and expand all of the dependencies. And then we take any of the eager dependencies
690    // that have yet to be added to be processed and add them to to worklist and expand all dependencies until there
691    // are no eager nodes left to process
692    final Node rootNode = graph.getRootNode();
693    rootNode.setDepth( 0 );
694    addDependsOnToWorkList( workList, rootNode, null );
695    processWorkList( graph, completed, workList );
696    List<Node> eagerNodes = graph.getRawNodeCollection().stream().filter( Node::isDeclaredEager ).toList();
697    while ( !eagerNodes.isEmpty() )
698    {
699      for ( final Node node : eagerNodes )
700      {
701        if ( node.isDepthNotSet() )
702        {
703          node.setDepth( 0 );
704          addDependsOnToWorkList( workList, node, null );
705          processWorkList( graph, completed, workList );
706        }
707      }
708      eagerNodes =
709        graph.getRawNodeCollection().stream().filter( n -> n.isDeclaredEager() && n.isDepthNotSet() ).toList();
710    }
711    graph.complete();
712  }
713
714  private void processWorkList( @Nonnull final ComponentGraph graph,
715                                @Nonnull final Set<Node> completed,
716                                @Nonnull final Stack<WorkEntry> workList )
717  {
718    while ( !workList.isEmpty() )
719    {
720      final WorkEntry workEntry = workList.pop();
721      final Edge edge = workEntry.getEntry().edge();
722      assert null != edge;
723      if ( edge.isSatisfied() )
724      {
725        for ( final Node node : edge.getSatisfiedBy() )
726        {
727          if ( !completed.contains( node ) )
728          {
729            completed.add( node );
730            addDependsOnToWorkList( workList, node, workEntry );
731          }
732        }
733        continue;
734      }
735      final ServiceRequest serviceRequest = edge.getServiceRequest();
736      final Coordinate coordinate = serviceRequest.getService().getCoordinate();
737      final List<Binding> bindings = new ArrayList<>( graph.findAllBindingsByCoordinate( coordinate ) );
738
739      if ( bindings.isEmpty() && coordinate.qualifier().isEmpty() )
740      {
741        final String typename = coordinate.type().toString();
742        final InjectableDescriptor injectable = _registry.findInjectableByClassName( typename );
743        if ( null != injectable && injectable.isAutoDiscoverable() )
744        {
745          bindings.add( injectable.getBinding() );
746        }
747        if ( bindings.isEmpty() )
748        {
749          final TypeElement typeElement = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( typename );
750          if ( null != typeElement )
751          {
752            final InjectableDescriptor candidate = deriveInjectableDescriptor( typeElement );
753            if ( null != candidate && candidate.isAutoDiscoverable() )
754            {
755              assert coordinate.equals( candidate.getBinding().getPublishedServices().get( 0 ).getCoordinate() );
756              _registry.registerInjectable( candidate );
757              bindings.add( candidate.getBinding() );
758            }
759            if ( bindings.isEmpty() )
760            {
761              bindings.addAll( autoDiscoverProviderBindings( graph, workEntry, typeElement ) );
762            }
763          }
764        }
765      }
766
767      final List<Binding> nullableProviders = bindings.stream()
768        .filter( b -> b.getPublishedServices().stream().anyMatch( ServiceSpec::isOptional ) )
769        .collect( Collectors.toList() );
770      if ( !serviceRequest.canConsumeOptionalBindings() && !nullableProviders.isEmpty() )
771      {
772        final String message =
773          MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
774                                "contain an optional provider method or optional injector input and " +
775                                "a non-optional service request for the coordinate " + coordinate + "\n" +
776                                "Dependency Path:\n" + workEntry.describePathFromRoot() + "\n" +
777                                "Binding" + ( nullableProviders.size() > 1 ? "s" : "" ) + ":\n" +
778                                bindingsToString( nullableProviders ) );
779        throw new ProcessorException( message, serviceRequest.getElement() );
780      }
781      if ( bindings.isEmpty() )
782      {
783        if ( serviceRequest.canBeAbsent() )
784        {
785          edge.setSatisfiedBy( Collections.emptyList() );
786        }
787        else
788        {
789          final String message =
790            MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
791                                  "contain a non-optional dependency " + coordinate +
792                                  " that can not be satisfied.\n" +
793                                  "Dependency Path:\n" + workEntry.describePathFromRoot() );
794          throw new ProcessorException( message, serviceRequest.getElement() );
795        }
796      }
797      else
798      {
799        final ServiceRequest.Kind kind = serviceRequest.getKind();
800        if ( 1 == bindings.size() || kind.isCollection() )
801        {
802          final List<Node> nodes = new ArrayList<>();
803          for ( final Binding binding : bindings )
804          {
805            final Node node = graph.findOrCreateProviderNode( binding, coordinate );
806            nodes.add( node );
807          }
808          edge.setSatisfiedBy( nodes );
809          for ( final Node node : nodes )
810          {
811            if ( node.isProxy() )
812            {
813              graph.attachProxyDependencies( node );
814            }
815            if ( !completed.contains( node ) )
816            {
817              completed.add( node );
818              addDependsOnToWorkList( workList, node, workEntry );
819            }
820          }
821        }
822        else
823        {
824          //noinspection ConstantConditions
825          assert bindings.size() > 1 && !kind.isCollection();
826          final String message =
827            MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
828                                  "contain a non-collection dependency " + coordinate +
829                                  " that can be satisfied by multiple nodes.\n" +
830                                  "Dependency Path:\n" + workEntry.describePathFromRoot() + "\n" +
831                                  "Candidate Nodes:\n" + bindingsToString( bindings ) );
832          throw new ProcessorException( message, serviceRequest.getElement() );
833        }
834      }
835    }
836  }
837
838  @Nonnull
839  private String bindingsToString( @Nonnull final List<Binding> bindings )
840  {
841    return bindings
842      .stream()
843      .map( b -> "  " + b.getTypeLabel() + "    " + b.describe() )
844      .collect( Collectors.joining( "\n" ) );
845  }
846
847  private void addDependsOnToWorkList( @Nonnull final Stack<WorkEntry> workList,
848                                       @Nonnull final Node node,
849                                       @Nullable final WorkEntry parent )
850  {
851    for ( final Edge e : node.getDependsOn() )
852    {
853      final Stack<PathEntry> stack = new Stack<>();
854      if ( null != parent )
855      {
856        stack.addAll( parent.getStack() );
857      }
858      final PathEntry entry = new PathEntry( node, e );
859      stack.add( entry );
860      workList.add( new WorkEntry( entry, stack ) );
861    }
862  }
863
864  private void emitObjectGraphJsonDescriptor( @Nonnull final ComponentGraph graph )
865    throws IOException
866  {
867    if ( _emitJsonDescriptors )
868    {
869      final TypeElement element = graph.getInjector().getElement();
870      final String filename = toFilename( element ) + GRAPH_SUFFIX;
871      debug( () -> "Emitting json descriptor for the injector " + graph.getInjector().getElement().getQualifiedName() );
872      JsonUtil.writeJsonResource( processingEnv, element, filename, graph::write );
873    }
874  }
875
876  @Nonnull
877  private ResolveType isFragmentResolved( @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env,
878                                          @Nonnull final FragmentDescriptor fragment )
879  {
880    if ( fragment.isResolved() )
881    {
882      return ResolveType.RESOLVED;
883    }
884    else
885    {
886      final String fragmentName = fragment.getElement().getQualifiedName().toString();
887      if ( _resolvingFragmentTypes.contains( fragmentName ) )
888      {
889        return ResolveType.RESOLVED;
890      }
891      _resolvingFragmentTypes.add( fragmentName );
892      try
893      {
894        final ResolveType resolveType = isResolved( env, fragment, fragment.getElement(), fragment.getIncludes() );
895        if ( resolveType == ResolveType.RESOLVED )
896        {
897          fragment.markAsResolved();
898          // Check for redundant explicit @Injectable includes that are also transitively included via fragments
899          maybeWarnOnRedundantDirectInjectableInclude( fragment.getElement(),
900                                                       Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
901                                                       fragment.getIncludes() );
902          // Check for include cycles between fragments
903          maybeWarnOnFragmentIncludeCycle( fragment.getElement(), fragment.getIncludes() );
904        }
905        return resolveType;
906      }
907      finally
908      {
909        _resolvingFragmentTypes.remove( fragmentName );
910      }
911    }
912  }
913
914  @Nonnull
915  private ResolveType isInjectorResolved( @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env,
916                                          @Nonnull final InjectorDescriptor injector )
917  {
918    final ResolveType resolveType = isResolved( env, injector, injector.getElement(), injector.getIncludes() );
919    if ( ResolveType.RESOLVED == resolveType )
920    {
921      // Check for redundant explicit @Injectable includes that are also transitively included via included fragments
922      maybeWarnOnRedundantDirectInjectableInclude( injector.getElement(),
923                                                   Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
924                                                   injector.getIncludes() );
925    }
926    return resolveType;
927  }
928
929  @Nonnull
930  private <T> ResolveType isResolved( @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env,
931                                      @Nonnull final T descriptor,
932                                      @Nonnull final TypeElement originator,
933                                      @Nonnull final Collection<IncludeDescriptor> includes )
934  {
935    // By the time we get here we can guarantee that the java types for includes are correctly resolved
936    // but they may not have passed through annotation processor and thus the descriptors may be absent
937    // so we go through a few iterations and as long as one include is resolved in each iteration we should
938    // keep going as we may be able to resolve all includes. Also if one of the includes is a provider
939    // we need to check the associated provider type is resolved.
940    for ( final IncludeDescriptor include : includes )
941    {
942      final ResolveType resolveType = isIncludeResolved( env, descriptor, originator, include );
943      if ( ResolveType.RESOLVED != resolveType )
944      {
945        return resolveType;
946      }
947    }
948
949    return ResolveType.RESOLVED;
950  }
951
952  @Nonnull
953  private ResolveType isIncludeResolved( @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env,
954                                         @Nonnull final Object descriptor,
955                                         @Nonnull final TypeElement originator,
956                                         @Nonnull final IncludeDescriptor include )
957  {
958    AnnotationMirror annotation =
959      AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( originator, Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME );
960
961    final String annotationClassname =
962      null != annotation ? Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME : Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME;
963    if ( null == annotation )
964    {
965      annotation = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationByType( originator, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME );
966    }
967
968    final String classname = include.actualTypeName();
969    final TypeElement element = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( classname );
970    if ( null == element )
971    {
972      assert include.isProvider();
973      if ( env.processingOver() )
974      {
975        if ( descriptor instanceof FragmentDescriptor )
976        {
977          ( (FragmentDescriptor) descriptor ).markAsContainsError();
978        }
979        else
980        {
981          ( (InjectorDescriptor) descriptor ).markAsContainsError();
982        }
983
984        final String message =
985          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( annotationClassname ) + " target has an " +
986          "parameter named 'includes' containing the value " + include.includedType() +
987          " and that type is annotated by the " +
988          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.STING_PROVIDER_CLASSNAME ) +
989          " annotation. The provider annotation expects a " +
990          "provider class named " + include.actualTypeName() + " but no such class exists. The " +
991          "type needs to be removed from the includes or the provider class needs to be present.";
992        reportError( env, message, originator, annotation, null );
993      }
994      return ResolveType.UNRESOLVED;
995    }
996    final boolean isInjectable = AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME );
997    final boolean isFragment =
998      !isInjectable && AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME );
999    if ( include.isProvider() && !isInjectable && !isFragment )
1000    {
1001      if ( descriptor instanceof FragmentDescriptor )
1002      {
1003        ( (FragmentDescriptor) descriptor ).markAsContainsError();
1004      }
1005      else
1006      {
1007        ( (InjectorDescriptor) descriptor ).markAsContainsError();
1008      }
1009
1010      final String message =
1011        MemberChecks.toSimpleName( annotationClassname ) + " target has an " +
1012        "parameter named 'includes' containing the value " + include.includedType() +
1013        " and that type is annotated by the " +
1014        MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.STING_PROVIDER_CLASSNAME ) +
1015        " annotation. The provider annotation expects a " +
1016        "provider class named " + include.actualTypeName() + " but that class is not annotated with either " +
1017        MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME ) + ", " +
1018        MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) + " or " +
1019        MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME );
1020      throw new ProcessorException( message, originator, annotation );
1021    }
1022    if ( descriptor instanceof final FragmentDescriptor fragmentDescriptor )
1023    {
1024      if ( fragmentDescriptor.isLocalOnly() && !isInSamePackage( originator, element ) )
1025      {
1026        fragmentDescriptor.markAsContainsError();
1027        final String message =
1028          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) + " target has an includes parameter " +
1029          "containing the value " + include.includedType() + " that is in the package " +
1030          GeneratorUtil.getQualifiedPackageName( element ) + " when the fragment is in the package " +
1031          GeneratorUtil.getQualifiedPackageName( originator ) + " and localOnly is true";
1032        throw new ProcessorException( message, originator, annotation );
1033      }
1034    }
1035    else if ( !include.auto() && ( (InjectorDescriptor) descriptor ).isFragmentOnly() && !isFragment )
1036    {
1037      final InjectorDescriptor injectorDescriptor = (InjectorDescriptor) descriptor;
1038      injectorDescriptor.markAsContainsError();
1039      final String message =
1040        MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME ) + " target has an includes parameter containing " +
1041        "the value " + include.includedType() + " that resolves to " + element.getQualifiedName() +
1042        " which is not annotated by " + MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) +
1043        " when fragmentOnly is true";
1044      throw new ProcessorException( message, originator, annotation );
1045    }
1046    if ( isFragment )
1047    {
1048      FragmentDescriptor fragment = _registry.findFragmentByClassName( classname );
1049      if ( null == fragment )
1050      {
1051        fragment = deriveFragmentDescriptor( element );
1052        if ( null == fragment )
1053        {
1054          debug( () -> "Unable to derive descriptor for fragment " + classname +
1055                       ". Marking " + originator.getQualifiedName() + " as unresolved" );
1056          return ResolveType.MAYBE_UNRESOLVED;
1057        }
1058        _registry.registerFragment( fragment );
1059      }
1060      if ( ResolveType.RESOLVED != isFragmentReady( env, fragment ) )
1061      {
1062        debug( () -> "Fragment include " + classname + " is present but not yet resolved. " +
1063                     "Marking " + originator.getQualifiedName() + " as unresolved" );
1064        return ResolveType.UNRESOLVED;
1065      }
1066    }
1067    else
1068    {
1069      InjectableDescriptor injectable = _registry.findInjectableByClassName( classname );
1070      if ( null == injectable )
1071      {
1072        injectable = deriveInjectableDescriptor( element );
1073        if ( null == injectable )
1074        {
1075          debug( () -> "Unable to derive descriptor for injectable " + classname +
1076                       ". Marking " + originator.getQualifiedName() + " as unresolved" );
1077          return ResolveType.MAYBE_UNRESOLVED;
1078        }
1079        _registry.registerInjectable( injectable );
1080      }
1081      if ( !SuperficialValidation.validateElement( processingEnv, injectable.getElement() ) )
1082      {
1083        debug( () -> "Injectable include " + classname + " is not yet resolved. " +
1084                     "Marking " + originator.getQualifiedName() + " as unresolved" );
1085        return ResolveType.UNRESOLVED;
1086      }
1087
1088      if ( !include.auto() &&
1089           !injectable.getBinding().isEager() &&
1090           injectable.isAutoDiscoverable() &&
1091           ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( originator, Constants.WARNING_AUTO_DISCOVERABLE_INCLUDED ) )
1092      {
1093        final String message =
1094          MemberChecks.shouldNot( annotationClassname,
1095                                  "include an auto-discoverable type " + classname + ". " +
1096                                  MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_AUTO_DISCOVERABLE_INCLUDED ) );
1097        warning( message, originator );
1098      }
1099    }
1100    return ResolveType.RESOLVED;
1101  }
1102
1103  private void processInjectorFragment( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
1104  {
1105    debug( () -> "Processing Injector Fragment: " + element );
1106    final ElementKind kind = element.getKind();
1107    if ( ElementKind.INTERFACE != kind )
1108    {
1109      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.INJECTOR_FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME, "be an interface" ),
1110                                    element );
1111    }
1112    final List<ExecutableElement> methods =
1113      ElementsUtil.getMethods( element, processingEnv.getElementUtils(), processingEnv.getTypeUtils() );
1114    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1115    {
1116      if ( method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.DEFAULT ) )
1117      {
1118        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTOR_FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) +
1119                                      " target must not include default methods",
1120                                      method );
1121      }
1122      else if ( method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.STATIC ) )
1123      {
1124        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTOR_FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) +
1125                                      " target must not include static methods",
1126                                      method );
1127      }
1128    }
1129  }
1130
1131  private void processInjector( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
1132    throws Exception
1133  {
1134    debug( () -> "Processing Injector: " + element );
1135    final ElementKind kind = element.getKind();
1136    if ( ElementKind.INTERFACE != kind )
1137    {
1138      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME, "be an interface" ),
1139                                    element );
1140    }
1141    if ( !element.getTypeParameters().isEmpty() )
1142    {
1143      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME, "have type parameters" ),
1144                                    element );
1145    }
1146    final List<? extends AnnotationMirror> scopedAnnotations = getScopedAnnotations( element );
1147    if ( !scopedAnnotations.isEmpty() )
1148    {
1149      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
1150                                                          "be annotated with an annotation that is " +
1151                                                          "annotated with the " + Constants.JSR_330_SCOPE_CLASSNAME +
1152                                                          " annotation such as " + scopedAnnotations ),
1153                                    element );
1154    }
1155
1156    final boolean gwt = isGwtEnabled( element );
1157    final boolean injectable =
1158      (boolean) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME, "injectable" ).getValue();
1159    final boolean fragmentOnly = extractInjectorFragmentOnly( element );
1160    final List<IncludeDescriptor> includes = extractIncludes( element, Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME, fragmentOnly );
1161    final List<InputDescriptor> inputs = extractInputs( element );
1162
1163    final List<ServiceRequest> outputs = new ArrayList<>();
1164    final List<ExecutableElement> methods =
1165      ElementsUtil.getMethods( element, processingEnv.getElementUtils(), processingEnv.getTypeUtils() );
1166    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1167    {
1168      if ( method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.ABSTRACT ) )
1169      {
1170        processInjectorOutputMethod( outputs, method );
1171      }
1172      else if ( method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.DEFAULT ) )
1173      {
1174        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME ) +
1175                                      " target must not include default methods",
1176                                      method );
1177      }
1178    }
1179    for ( final Element enclosedElement : element.getEnclosedElements() )
1180    {
1181      final ElementKind enclosedElementKind = enclosedElement.getKind();
1182      if ( ElementKind.INTERFACE == enclosedElementKind &&
1183           AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( enclosedElement, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) )
1184      {
1185        final DeclaredType type = (DeclaredType) enclosedElement.asType();
1186        if ( includes.stream().noneMatch( d -> Objects.equals( d.includedType(), type ) ) )
1187        {
1188          includes.add( new IncludeDescriptor( type, type.toString(), true ) );
1189        }
1190        else
1191        {
1192          throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME ) +
1193                                        " target must not include a " +
1194                                        MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) + " annotated " +
1195                                        "type that is auto-included as it is enclosed within the injector type",
1196                                        element );
1197        }
1198      }
1199      else if ( ElementKind.CLASS == enclosedElementKind &&
1200                AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( enclosedElement, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) )
1201      {
1202        final DeclaredType type = (DeclaredType) enclosedElement.asType();
1203        if ( includes.stream().noneMatch( d -> Objects.equals( d.includedType(), type ) ) )
1204        {
1205          includes.add( new IncludeDescriptor( type, type.toString(), true ) );
1206        }
1207        else
1208        {
1209          throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME ) +
1210                                        " target must not include an " +
1211                                        MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) + " annotated " +
1212                                        "type that is auto-included as it is enclosed within the injector type",
1213                                        element );
1214        }
1215      }
1216      else if ( enclosedElementKind.isClass() || enclosedElementKind.isInterface() )
1217      {
1218        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME ) +
1219                                      " target must not contain a type that is not annotated " +
1220                                      "by either " + MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) +
1221                                      " or " + MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ),
1222                                      element );
1223      }
1224    }
1225    final InjectorDescriptor injector =
1226      new InjectorDescriptor( element, gwt, injectable, fragmentOnly, includes, inputs, outputs );
1227    _registry.registerInjector( injector );
1228    emitInjectorJsonDescriptor( injector );
1229  }
1230
1231  private boolean extractInjectorFragmentOnly( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
1232  {
1233    return (boolean) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME, "fragmentOnly" )
1234      .getValue();
1235  }
1236
1237  private boolean isGwtEnabled( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
1238  {
1239    final String value = AnnotationsUtil.getEnumAnnotationParameter( element, Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME, "gwt" );
1240    return "ENABLE".equals( value ) ||
1241           ( "AUTODETECT".equals( value ) &&
1242             null != processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( "javaemul.internal.annotations.DoNotInline" ) );
1243  }
1244
1245  private void emitInjectorJsonDescriptor( @Nonnull final InjectorDescriptor injector )
1246    throws IOException
1247  {
1248    if ( _emitJsonDescriptors )
1249    {
1250      final TypeElement element = injector.getElement();
1251      final String filename = toFilename( element ) + JSON_SUFFIX;
1252      JsonUtil.writeJsonResource( processingEnv, element, filename, injector::write );
1253    }
1254  }
1255
1256  private void processInjectorOutputMethod( @Nonnull final List<ServiceRequest> outputs,
1257                                            @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
1258  {
1259    assert method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.ABSTRACT );
1260    if ( !findInterceptorBindingAnnotations( method ).isEmpty() )
1261    {
1262      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor bindings on non-fragment methods are not supported in v1",
1263                                    method );
1264    }
1265    if ( TypeKind.VOID == method.getReturnType().getKind() )
1266    {
1267      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
1268                                                          "contain a method that has a void return value" ),
1269                                    method );
1270    }
1271    else if ( !method.getParameters().isEmpty() )
1272    {
1273      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
1274                                                          "contain a method that has parameters" ),
1275                                    method );
1276    }
1277    else if ( !method.getTypeParameters().isEmpty() )
1278    {
1279      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
1280                                                          "contain a method that has any type parameters" ),
1281                                    method );
1282    }
1283    else if ( !method.getThrownTypes().isEmpty() )
1284    {
1285      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
1286                                                          "contain a method that throws any exceptions" ),
1287                                    method );
1288    }
1289    final List<? extends AnnotationMirror> scopedAnnotations = getScopedAnnotations( method );
1290    if ( !scopedAnnotations.isEmpty() )
1291    {
1292      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
1293                                                          "contain a method that is annotated with an " +
1294                                                          "annotation that is annotated with the " +
1295                                                          Constants.JSR_330_SCOPE_CLASSNAME +
1296                                                          " annotation such as " + scopedAnnotations ),
1297                                    method );
1298    }
1299    outputs.add( processOutputMethod( method ) );
1300  }
1301
1302  @Nonnull
1303  private ServiceRequest processOutputMethod( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
1304  {
1305    final TypeMirror type = method.getReturnType();
1306    if ( TypesUtil.containsArrayType( type ) )
1307    {
1308      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
1309                                                          "contain a method with a return type that contains an array type" ),
1310                                    method );
1311    }
1312    else if ( TypesUtil.containsWildcard( type ) )
1313    {
1314      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
1315                                                          "contain a method with a return type that contains a wildcard type parameter" ),
1316                                    method );
1317    }
1318    else if ( TypesUtil.containsRawType( type ) )
1319    {
1320      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
1321                                                          "contain a method with a return type that contains a raw type" ),
1322                                    method );
1323    }
1324    else
1325    {
1326      TypeMirror dependencyType = null;
1327      ServiceRequest.Kind kind = null;
1328      for ( final ServiceRequest.Kind candidate : ServiceRequest.Kind.values() )
1329      {
1330        dependencyType = candidate.extractType( type );
1331        if ( null != dependencyType )
1332        {
1333          kind = candidate;
1334          break;
1335        }
1336      }
1337      if ( null == kind )
1338      {
1339        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
1340                                                            "contain a method with a return type that contains an unexpected parameterized type. Only parameterized types known to the framework are supported" ),
1341                                      method );
1342      }
1343      else
1344      {
1345        final boolean optional = AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( method );
1346        if ( optional && ServiceRequest.Kind.INSTANCE != kind )
1347        {
1348          throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
1349                                                              "contain a method annotated with " +
1350                                                              MemberChecks.toSimpleName( AnnotationsUtil.NULLABLE_CLASSNAME ) +
1351                                                              " that is not an instance dependency kind" ),
1352                                        method );
1353        }
1354        final String qualifier = getQualifier( method );
1355        if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.JSR_330_NAMED_CLASSNAME ) )
1356        {
1357          throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
1358                                                              "contain a method annotated with the " +
1359                                                              Constants.JSR_330_NAMED_CLASSNAME +
1360                                                              " annotation. Use the " + Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME +
1361                                                              " annotation instead" ),
1362                                        method );
1363        }
1364
1365        final Coordinate coordinate = new Coordinate( qualifier, dependencyType );
1366        final ServiceSpec service = new ServiceSpec( coordinate, optional );
1367        return new ServiceRequest( kind, service, method );
1368      }
1369    }
1370  }
1371
1372  private void verifyNamedElements( @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env,
1373                                    @Nonnull final Set<? extends Element> elements )
1374  {
1375    for ( final Element element : elements )
1376    {
1377      final AnnotationUsageKind usageKind = classifyNamedElement( element );
1378      if ( AnnotationUsageKind.INVALID == usageKind )
1379      {
1380        if ( ElementKind.PARAMETER == element.getKind() )
1381        {
1382          if ( ElementKind.CONSTRUCTOR == element.getEnclosingElement().getKind() )
1383          {
1384            reportError( env,
1385                         MemberChecks.must( Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME,
1386                                            "only be present on a constructor parameter if the constructor " +
1387                                            "is enclosed in a type annotated with " +
1388                                            MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) +
1389                                            " or the type is annotated with an annotation annotated by " +
1390                                            MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.ACT_AS_STING_CONSUMER_CLASSNAME ) +
1391                                            " or " +
1392                                            MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.ACT_AS_STING_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) ),
1393                         element );
1394          }
1395          else
1396          {
1397            reportError( env,
1398                         MemberChecks.must( Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME,
1399                                            "only be present on a method parameter if the method is enclosed in a type annotated with " +
1400                                            MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) ),
1401                         element );
1402          }
1403        }
1404        else if ( ElementKind.CLASS == element.getKind() )
1405        {
1406          reportError( env,
1407                       MemberChecks.must( Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME,
1408                                          "only be present on a type if the type is annotated with " +
1409                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) +
1410                                          " or the type is annotated with an annotation annotated by " +
1411                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.ACT_AS_STING_PROVIDER_CLASSNAME ) +
1412                                          " or " +
1413                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.ACT_AS_STING_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) ),
1414                       element );
1415        }
1416        else if ( ElementKind.METHOD == element.getKind() )
1417        {
1418          reportError( env,
1419                       MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME,
1420                                             "be a method unless the method is enclosed in a type annotated with " +
1421                                             MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) + ", " +
1422                                             MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME ) + " or " +
1423                                             MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTOR_FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) ),
1424                       element );
1425        }
1426        else
1427        {
1428          reportError( env,
1429                       MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME ) + " target is not valid",
1430                       element );
1431        }
1432      }
1433      else if ( AnnotationUsageKind.PROCESSED != usageKind &&
1434                AnnotationUsageKind.SILENT_INTEGRATION_EXCEPTION != usageKind )
1435      {
1436        reportError( env,
1437                     MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME ) + " target is not valid",
1438                     element );
1439      }
1440    }
1441  }
1442
1443  @Nonnull
1444  private AnnotationUsageKind classifyNamedElement( @Nonnull final Element element )
1445  {
1446    if ( ElementKind.PARAMETER == element.getKind() )
1447    {
1448      final Element executableElement = element.getEnclosingElement();
1449      final Element enclosingType = executableElement.getEnclosingElement();
1450      if ( ElementKind.CONSTRUCTOR == executableElement.getKind() )
1451      {
1452        if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( enclosingType, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) )
1453        {
1454          return AnnotationUsageKind.PROCESSED;
1455        }
1456        else if ( hasActAsStingConsumer( enclosingType ) )
1457        {
1458          return AnnotationUsageKind.SILENT_INTEGRATION_EXCEPTION;
1459        }
1460        else
1461        {
1462          return AnnotationUsageKind.INVALID;
1463        }
1464      }
1465      else if ( ElementKind.METHOD == executableElement.getKind() &&
1466                AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( enclosingType, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) )
1467      {
1468        return AnnotationUsageKind.PROCESSED;
1469      }
1470      else
1471      {
1472        return AnnotationUsageKind.INVALID;
1473      }
1474    }
1475    else if ( ElementKind.CLASS == element.getKind() )
1476    {
1477      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) )
1478      {
1479        return AnnotationUsageKind.PROCESSED;
1480      }
1481      else if ( hasActAsStingProvider( element ) )
1482      {
1483        return AnnotationUsageKind.SILENT_INTEGRATION_EXCEPTION;
1484      }
1485      else
1486      {
1487        return AnnotationUsageKind.INVALID;
1488      }
1489    }
1490    else if ( ElementKind.METHOD == element.getKind() )
1491    {
1492      final Element enclosingType = element.getEnclosingElement();
1493      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( enclosingType, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) ||
1494           AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( enclosingType, Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME ) )
1495      {
1496        return AnnotationUsageKind.PROCESSED;
1497      }
1498      else if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( enclosingType, Constants.INJECTOR_FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) )
1499      {
1500        return AnnotationUsageKind.SILENT_INTEGRATION_EXCEPTION;
1501      }
1502      else
1503      {
1504        return AnnotationUsageKind.INVALID;
1505      }
1506    }
1507    else
1508    {
1509      return AnnotationUsageKind.INVALID;
1510    }
1511  }
1512
1513  private boolean hasActAsStingConsumer( @Nonnull final Element element )
1514  {
1515    return hasValidationRole( element,
1516                              Constants.ACT_AS_STING_CONSUMER_SIMPLE_NAME,
1517                              Constants.ACT_AS_STING_COMPONENT_SIMPLE_NAME );
1518  }
1519
1520  private boolean hasActAsStingProvider( @Nonnull final Element element )
1521  {
1522    return hasValidationRole( element,
1523                              Constants.ACT_AS_STING_PROVIDER_SIMPLE_NAME,
1524                              Constants.ACT_AS_STING_COMPONENT_SIMPLE_NAME );
1525  }
1526
1527  private boolean hasValidationRole( @Nonnull final Element element, @Nonnull final String... annotationNames )
1528  {
1529    return hasAnnotationWithAnnotationMatching( element, ca -> matchesValidationRole( ca, annotationNames ) );
1530  }
1531
1532  private boolean matchesValidationRole( @Nonnull final AnnotationMirror annotation,
1533                                         @Nonnull final String... annotationNames )
1534  {
1535    final Element element = annotation.getAnnotationType().asElement();
1536    if ( ElementKind.ANNOTATION_TYPE != element.getKind() ||
1537         element.getEnclosedElements().stream().anyMatch( e -> ElementKind.METHOD == e.getKind() ) )
1538    {
1539      return false;
1540    }
1541    final String simpleName = element.getSimpleName().toString();
1542    return Arrays.asList( annotationNames ).contains( simpleName );
1543  }
1544
1545  private boolean hasAnnotationWithAnnotationMatching( @Nonnull final AnnotatedConstruct element,
1546                                                       @Nonnull final Predicate<? super AnnotationMirror> predicate )
1547  {
1548    return element
1549      .getAnnotationMirrors()
1550      .stream()
1551      .anyMatch( a -> a.getAnnotationType()
1552        .asElement()
1553        .getAnnotationMirrors()
1554        .stream()
1555        .anyMatch( predicate ) );
1556  }
1557
1558  private void verifyTypedElements( @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env,
1559                                    @Nonnull final Set<? extends Element> elements )
1560  {
1561    for ( final Element element : elements )
1562    {
1563      final AnnotationUsageKind usageKind = classifyTypedElement( element );
1564      if ( AnnotationUsageKind.PROCESSED != usageKind &&
1565           AnnotationUsageKind.SILENT_INTEGRATION_EXCEPTION != usageKind )
1566      {
1567        if ( ElementKind.CLASS == element.getKind() )
1568        {
1569          reportError( env,
1570                       MemberChecks.must( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME,
1571                                          "only be present on a type if the type is annotated with " +
1572                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) +
1573                                          " or the type is annotated with an annotation annotated by " +
1574                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.ACT_AS_STING_PROVIDER_CLASSNAME ) +
1575                                          " or " +
1576                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.ACT_AS_STING_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) ),
1577                       element );
1578        }
1579        else if ( ElementKind.METHOD == element.getKind() )
1580        {
1581          reportError( env,
1582                       MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME,
1583                                             "be a method unless the method is enclosed in a type annotated with " +
1584                                             MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) ),
1585                       element );
1586        }
1587        else
1588        {
1589          reportError( env,
1590                       MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) + " target is not valid",
1591                       element );
1592        }
1593      }
1594    }
1595  }
1596
1597  @Nonnull
1598  private AnnotationUsageKind classifyTypedElement( @Nonnull final Element element )
1599  {
1600    if ( ElementKind.CLASS == element.getKind() )
1601    {
1602      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) )
1603      {
1604        return AnnotationUsageKind.PROCESSED;
1605      }
1606      else if ( hasActAsStingProvider( element ) )
1607      {
1608        return AnnotationUsageKind.SILENT_INTEGRATION_EXCEPTION;
1609      }
1610      else
1611      {
1612        return AnnotationUsageKind.INVALID;
1613      }
1614    }
1615    else if ( ElementKind.METHOD == element.getKind() )
1616    {
1617      final Element enclosingType = element.getEnclosingElement();
1618      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( enclosingType, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) )
1619      {
1620        return AnnotationUsageKind.PROCESSED;
1621      }
1622      else
1623      {
1624        return AnnotationUsageKind.INVALID;
1625      }
1626    }
1627    else
1628    {
1629      return AnnotationUsageKind.INVALID;
1630    }
1631  }
1632
1633  private void verifyEagerElements( @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env,
1634                                    @Nonnull final Set<? extends Element> elements )
1635  {
1636    for ( final Element element : elements )
1637    {
1638      final AnnotationUsageKind usageKind = classifyEagerElement( element );
1639      if ( AnnotationUsageKind.PROCESSED != usageKind &&
1640           AnnotationUsageKind.SILENT_INTEGRATION_EXCEPTION != usageKind )
1641      {
1642        if ( ElementKind.CLASS == element.getKind() )
1643        {
1644          reportError( env,
1645                       MemberChecks.must( Constants.EAGER_CLASSNAME,
1646                                          "only be present on a type if the type is annotated with " +
1647                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) +
1648                                          " or the type is annotated with an annotation annotated by " +
1649                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.ACT_AS_STING_PROVIDER_CLASSNAME ) +
1650                                          " or " +
1651                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.ACT_AS_STING_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) ),
1652                       element );
1653        }
1654        else if ( ElementKind.METHOD == element.getKind() )
1655        {
1656          reportError( env,
1657                       MemberChecks.must( Constants.EAGER_CLASSNAME,
1658                                          "only be present on a method if the method is enclosed in a type annotated with " +
1659                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) ),
1660                       element );
1661        }
1662        else
1663        {
1664          reportError( env,
1665                       MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.EAGER_CLASSNAME ) + " target is not valid",
1666                       element );
1667        }
1668      }
1669    }
1670  }
1671
1672  @Nonnull
1673  private AnnotationUsageKind classifyEagerElement( @Nonnull final Element element )
1674  {
1675    if ( ElementKind.CLASS == element.getKind() )
1676    {
1677      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) )
1678      {
1679        return AnnotationUsageKind.PROCESSED;
1680      }
1681      else if ( hasActAsStingProvider( element ) )
1682      {
1683        return AnnotationUsageKind.SILENT_INTEGRATION_EXCEPTION;
1684      }
1685      else
1686      {
1687        return AnnotationUsageKind.INVALID;
1688      }
1689    }
1690    else if ( ElementKind.METHOD == element.getKind() &&
1691              AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element.getEnclosingElement(), Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) )
1692    {
1693      return AnnotationUsageKind.PROCESSED;
1694    }
1695    else
1696    {
1697      return AnnotationUsageKind.INVALID;
1698    }
1699  }
1700
1701  private void processFragment( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
1702  {
1703    debug( () -> "Processing Fragment: " + element );
1704    if ( ElementKind.INTERFACE != element.getKind() )
1705    {
1706      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME, "be an interface" ),
1707                                    element );
1708    }
1709    else if ( !element.getTypeParameters().isEmpty() )
1710    {
1711      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME, "have type parameters" ),
1712                                    element );
1713    }
1714    else if ( !element.getInterfaces().isEmpty() )
1715    {
1716      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME, "extend any interfaces" ),
1717                                    element );
1718    }
1719    final boolean localOnly = extractFragmentLocalOnly( element );
1720    final List<IncludeDescriptor> includes = extractIncludes( element, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME, false );
1721    final Map<ExecutableElement, Binding> bindings = new LinkedHashMap<>();
1722    for ( final Element enclosedElement : element.getEnclosedElements() )
1723    {
1724      final ElementKind enclosedElementKind = enclosedElement.getKind();
1725      if ( ElementKind.METHOD == enclosedElementKind )
1726      {
1727        processProvidesMethod( element, bindings, (ExecutableElement) enclosedElement );
1728      }
1729      if ( enclosedElementKind.isClass() || enclosedElementKind.isInterface() )
1730      {
1731        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) +
1732                                      " target must not contain any types",
1733                                      element );
1734      }
1735    }
1736    if ( bindings.isEmpty() && includes.isEmpty() )
1737    {
1738      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
1739                                                       "contain one or more methods or one or more includes" ),
1740                                    element );
1741    }
1742    final List<? extends AnnotationMirror> scopedAnnotations = getScopedAnnotations( element );
