1743    if ( !scopedAnnotations.isEmpty() )
1744    {
1745      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
1746                                                          "be annotated with an annotation that is " +
1747                                                          "annotated with the " + Constants.JSR_330_SCOPE_CLASSNAME +
1748                                                          " annotation such as " + scopedAnnotations ),
1749                                    element );
1750    }
1751    _registry.registerFragment( new FragmentDescriptor( element, includes, localOnly, bindings.values() ) );
1752  }
1753
1754  private void processFactory( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
1755  {
1756    debug( () -> "Processing Factory: " + element );
1757    if ( ElementKind.INTERFACE != element.getKind() )
1758    {
1759      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME, "be an interface" ),
1760                                    element );
1761    }
1762    else if ( !element.getTypeParameters().isEmpty() )
1763    {
1764      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME, "have type parameters" ),
1765                                    element );
1766    }
1767    else if ( !element.getInterfaces().isEmpty() )
1768    {
1769      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME, "extend any interfaces" ),
1770                                    element );
1771    }
1772
1773    final List<FactoryMethodDescriptor> methods = new ArrayList<>();
1774    final List<FactoryDependencyDescriptor> dependencies = new ArrayList<>();
1775    final Set<String> usedFieldNames = new HashSet<>();
1776    for ( final Element enclosedElement : element.getEnclosedElements() )
1777    {
1778      if ( ElementKind.METHOD == enclosedElement.getKind() )
1779      {
1780        final ExecutableElement method = (ExecutableElement) enclosedElement;
1781        if ( !method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.DEFAULT ) &&
1782             !method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.STATIC ) &&
1783             !method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PRIVATE ) )
1784        {
1785          methods.add( processFactoryMethod( element, method, dependencies, usedFieldNames ) );
1786        }
1787      }
1788    }
1789    if ( methods.isEmpty() )
1790    {
1791      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
1792                                                       "contain at least one abstract method that returns a value" ),
1793                                    element );
1794    }
1795
1796    _registry.registerFactory( new FactoryDescriptor( element, methods, dependencies ) );
1797  }
1798
1799  @SuppressWarnings( "unchecked" )
1800  @Nonnull
1801  private List<InputDescriptor> extractInputs( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
1802  {
1803    final List<InputDescriptor> results = new ArrayList<>();
1804    final AnnotationMirror annotation = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationByType( element, Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME );
1805    final AnnotationValue inputsAnnotationValue = AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationValue( annotation, "inputs" );
1806    assert null != inputsAnnotationValue;
1807    final List<AnnotationMirror> inputs = (List<AnnotationMirror>) inputsAnnotationValue.getValue();
1808
1809    final int size = inputs.size();
1810    for ( int i = 0; i < size; i++ )
1811    {
1812      final AnnotationMirror input = inputs.get( i );
1813      final String qualifier = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( input, "qualifier" );
1814      final AnnotationValue typeAnnotationValue = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( input, "type" );
1815      final TypeMirror type = (TypeMirror) typeAnnotationValue.getValue();
1816      if ( TypeKind.ARRAY == type.getKind() )
1817      {
1818        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME ) +
1819                                      " must not specify an array type for the type parameter",
1820                                      element,
1821                                      input,
1822                                      typeAnnotationValue );
1823      }
1824      else if ( TypeKind.VOID == type.getKind() )
1825      {
1826        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME ) +
1827                                      " must specify a non-void type for the type parameter",
1828                                      element,
1829                                      input,
1830                                      typeAnnotationValue );
1831      }
1832      else if ( TypeKind.DECLARED == type.getKind() &&
1833                !( (TypeElement) ( (DeclaredType) type ).asElement() ).getTypeParameters().isEmpty() )
1834      {
1835        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME ) +
1836                                      " must not specify a parameterized type for the type parameter",
1837                                      element,
1838                                      input,
1839                                      typeAnnotationValue );
1840      }
1841      final Coordinate coordinate = new Coordinate( qualifier, type );
1842      final boolean optional = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( input, "optional" );
1843      final ServiceSpec service = new ServiceSpec( coordinate, optional );
1844    final Binding binding =
1845      new Binding( Binding.Kind.INPUT,
1846                   element.getQualifiedName() + "#" + i,
1847                   Collections.singletonList( service ),
1848                   true,
1849                   element,
1850                   new ServiceRequest[ 0 ] );
1851      processInterceptorBindings( binding, element );
1852      results.add( new InputDescriptor( service, binding, "input" + ( i + 1 ) ) );
1853    }
1854    return results;
1855  }
1856
1857  @Nonnull
1858  private List<IncludeDescriptor> extractIncludes( @Nonnull final TypeElement element,
1859                                                   @Nonnull final String annotationClassname,
1860                                                   final boolean fragmentOnly )
1861  {
1862    final List<IncludeDescriptor> results = new ArrayList<>();
1863    final List<TypeMirror> includes =
1864      AnnotationsUtil.getTypeMirrorsAnnotationParameter( element, annotationClassname, "includes" );
1865    final Set<String> included = new HashSet<>();
1866    for ( final TypeMirror include : includes )
1867    {
1868      if ( processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isSameType( include, element.asType() ) )
1869      {
1870        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( annotationClassname ) +
1871                                      " target must not include self",
1872                                      element );
1873      }
1874      if ( include.getKind().isPrimitive() )
1875      {
1876        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( annotationClassname ) +
1877                                      " target must not include a primitive in the includes parameter",
1878                                      element );
1879      }
1880      final Element includeElement = processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asElement( include );
1881      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( includeElement, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) ||
1882           AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( includeElement, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) )
1883      {
1884        if ( fragmentOnly &&
1885             AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( includeElement, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) )
1886        {
1887          throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( annotationClassname ) +
1888                                        " target has an includes parameter containing the value " + include +
1889                                        " that is not annotated by " +
1890                                        MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) +
1891                                        " when fragmentOnly is true",
1892                                        element );
1893        }
1894        results.add( new IncludeDescriptor( (DeclaredType) include, include.toString(), false ) );
1895      }
1896      else
1897      {
1898        final ElementKind kind = includeElement.getKind();
1899        if ( ElementKind.CLASS == kind || ElementKind.INTERFACE == kind )
1900        {
1901          final ProviderEntry provider =
1902            resolveSingleStingProvider( element,
1903                                        MemberChecks.toSimpleName( annotationClassname ) +
1904                                        " target has an 'includes' parameter containing the value " +
1905                                        includeElement.asType(),
1906                                        (TypeElement) includeElement );
1907          if ( null != provider )
1908          {
1909            final String targetQualifiedName =
1910              deriveProviderQualifiedName( (TypeElement) includeElement, provider.provider() );
1911            results.add( new IncludeDescriptor( (DeclaredType) include, targetQualifiedName, false ) );
1912          }
1913          else
1914          {
1915            throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( annotationClassname ) +
1916                                          " target has an includes parameter containing the value " + include +
1917                                          " that is not a type annotated by either " +
1918                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) +
1919                                          " or " +
1920                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) +
1921                                          " and the type does not declare a provider",
1922                                          element );
1923          }
1924        }
1925      }
1926      final String includedType = include.toString();
1927      if ( included.contains( includedType ) )
1928      {
1929        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( annotationClassname ) +
1930                                      " target has an includes parameter containing duplicate " +
1931                                      "includes with the type " + includedType,
1932                                      element );
1933      }
1934      else
1935      {
1936        included.add( includedType );
1937      }
1938    }
1939    return results;
1940  }
1941
1942  @Nullable
1943  private ProviderEntry resolveSingleStingProvider( @Nonnull final TypeElement element,
1944                                                    @Nonnull final String targetDescription,
1945                                                    @Nonnull final TypeElement annotatedType )
1946  {
1947    final List<ProviderEntry> providers =
1948      annotatedType.getAnnotationMirrors()
1949        .stream()
1950        .map( a -> {
1951          final AnnotationMirror provider = getStingProvider( element, targetDescription, a );
1952          return null != provider ? new ProviderEntry( a, provider ) : null;
1953        } )
1954        .filter( Objects::nonNull )
1955        .toList();
1956    if ( providers.size() > 1 )
1957    {
1958      final String message =
1959        targetDescription + " that is annotated by multiple " +
1960        MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.STING_PROVIDER_CLASSNAME ) +
1961        " annotations. Matching annotations:\n" +
1962        providers
1963          .stream()
1964          .map( a -> ( (TypeElement) a.annotation().getAnnotationType().asElement() ).getQualifiedName() )
1965          .map( a -> "  " + a )
1966          .collect( Collectors.joining( "\n" ) );
1967      throw new ProcessorException( message, element );
1968    }
1969    return providers.isEmpty() ? null : providers.get( 0 );
1970  }
1971
1972  @Nullable
1973  private AnnotationMirror getStingProvider( @Nonnull final TypeElement element,
1974                                             @Nonnull final String targetDescription,
1975                                             @Nonnull final AnnotationMirror annotation )
1976  {
1977    return annotation.getAnnotationType()
1978      .asElement()
1979      .getAnnotationMirrors()
1980      .stream()
1981      .filter( ca -> isStingProvider( element, targetDescription, ca ) )
1982      .findAny()
1983      .orElse( null );
1984  }
1985
1986  @Nonnull
1987  private String deriveProviderQualifiedName( @Nonnull final TypeElement annotatedType,
1988                                              @Nonnull final AnnotationMirror providerAnnotation )
1989  {
1990    final String namePattern = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( providerAnnotation, "value" );
1991    final String targetCompoundType =
1992      namePattern
1993        .replace( "[SimpleName]", annotatedType.getSimpleName().toString() )
1994        .replace( "[CompoundName]", getComponentName( annotatedType ) )
1995        .replace( "[EnclosingName]", getEnclosingName( annotatedType ) )
1996        .replace( "[FlatEnclosingName]", getEnclosingName( annotatedType ).replace( '.', '_' ) );
1997    return ElementsUtil.getPackageElement( annotatedType ).getQualifiedName() + "." + targetCompoundType;
1998  }
1999
2000  @Nonnull
2001  private String getComponentName( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
2002  {
2003    return getEnclosingName( element ) + element.getSimpleName();
2004  }
2005
2006  @Nonnull
2007  private String getEnclosingName( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
2008  {
2009    Element enclosingElement = element.getEnclosingElement();
2010    final List<String> nameParts = new ArrayList<>();
2011    while ( ElementKind.PACKAGE != enclosingElement.getKind() )
2012    {
2013      nameParts.add( enclosingElement.getSimpleName().toString() );
2014      enclosingElement = enclosingElement.getEnclosingElement();
2015    }
2016    if ( nameParts.isEmpty() )
2017    {
2018      return "";
2019    }
2020    else
2021    {
2022      Collections.reverse( nameParts );
2023      return String.join( ".", nameParts ) + ".";
2024    }
2025  }
2026
2027  private boolean isStingProvider( @Nonnull final TypeElement element,
2028                                   @Nonnull final String targetDescription,
2029                                   @Nonnull final AnnotationMirror annotation )
2030  {
2031    if ( !annotation.getAnnotationType().asElement().getSimpleName().contentEquals( "StingProvider" ) )
2032    {
2033      return false;
2034    }
2035    else
2036    {
2037      final boolean nameMatched = annotation.getElementValues()
2038        .entrySet()
2039        .stream()
2040        .anyMatch( e -> e.getKey().getSimpleName().contentEquals( "value" ) &&
2041                        e.getValue().getValue() instanceof String );
2042      if ( nameMatched )
2043      {
2044        return true;
2045      }
2046      else
2047      {
2048        final String message = targetDescription +
2049                               " that is annotated by " + annotation +
2050                               " that is annotated by an invalid " +
2051                               MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.STING_PROVIDER_CLASSNAME ) +
2052                               " annotation missing a 'value' parameter of type string.";
2053        throw new ProcessorException( message, element );
2054      }
2055    }
2056  }
2057
2058  @Nonnull
2059  private List<Binding> autoDiscoverProviderBindings( @Nonnull final ComponentGraph graph,
2060                                                      @Nonnull final WorkEntry workEntry,
2061                                                      @Nonnull final TypeElement frameworkType )
2062  {
2063    final ProviderEntry provider =
2064      resolveSingleStingProvider( graph.getInjector().getElement(),
2065                                  MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME ) +
2066                                  " target is attempting to auto-discover the type " + frameworkType.asType(),
2067                                  frameworkType );
2068    if ( null == provider )
2069    {
2070      return Collections.emptyList();
2071    }
2072
2073    final String providerTypeName = deriveProviderQualifiedName( frameworkType, provider.provider() );
2074    final TypeElement providerType = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( providerTypeName );
2075    final Coordinate coordinate = new Coordinate( "", frameworkType.asType() );
2076    if ( null == providerType )
2077    {
2078      throw new ProcessorException( buildAutoDiscoverProviderError( coordinate,
2079                                                                    workEntry,
2080                                                                    "the framework type " +
2081                                                                    frameworkType.getQualifiedName() +
2082                                                                    " expects a provider class named " +
2083                                                                    providerTypeName + " but no such class exists" ),
2084                                    workEntry.getEntry().edge().getServiceRequest().getElement() );
2085    }
2086
2087    if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( providerType, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) )
2088    {
2089      FragmentDescriptor fragment = _registry.findFragmentByClassName( providerTypeName );
2090      if ( null == fragment )
2091      {
2092        fragment = deriveFragmentDescriptor( providerType );
2093        if ( null != fragment )
2094        {
2095          _registry.registerFragment( fragment );
2096        }
2097      }
2098      if ( null == fragment )
2099      {
2100        return Collections.emptyList();
2101      }
2102      verifyAutoDiscoverProviderPublishesType( coordinate, providerType, fragment.getBindings(), workEntry );
2103      registerAutoDiscoveredFragment( graph, fragment );
2104      return graph.findAllBindingsByCoordinate( coordinate );
2105    }
2106    else if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( providerType, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) )
2107    {
2108      InjectableDescriptor injectable = _registry.findInjectableByClassName( providerTypeName );
2109      if ( null == injectable )
2110      {
2111        injectable = deriveInjectableDescriptor( providerType );
2112        if ( null != injectable )
2113        {
2114          _registry.registerInjectable( injectable );
2115        }
2116      }
2117      if ( null == injectable )
2118      {
2119        return Collections.emptyList();
2120      }
2121      verifyAutoDiscoverProviderPublishesType( coordinate,
2122                                               providerType,
2123                                               Collections.singletonList( injectable.getBinding() ),
2124                                               workEntry );
2125      graph.registerInjectable( injectable );
2126      return Collections.singletonList( injectable.getBinding() );
2127    }
2128    else
2129    {
2130      throw new ProcessorException( buildAutoDiscoverProviderError( coordinate,
2131                                                                    workEntry,
2132                                                                    "the framework type " +
2133                                                                    frameworkType.getQualifiedName() +
2134                                                                    " expects a provider class named " +
2135                                                                    providerTypeName +
2136                                                                    " but that class is not annotated with either " +
2137                                                                    MemberChecks.toSimpleName(
2138                                                                      Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) +
2139                                                                    " or " +
2140                                                                    MemberChecks.toSimpleName(
2141                                                                      Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) ),
2142                                    workEntry.getEntry().edge().getServiceRequest().getElement() );
2143    }
2144  }
2145
2146  private void registerAutoDiscoveredFragment( @Nonnull final ComponentGraph graph,
2147                                               @Nonnull final FragmentDescriptor fragment )
2148  {
2149    registerAutoDiscoveredIncludes( graph, fragment.getIncludes() );
2150    graph.registerFragment( fragment );
2151  }
2152
2153  private void registerAutoDiscoveredIncludes( @Nonnull final ComponentGraph graph,
2154                                               @Nonnull final Collection<IncludeDescriptor> includes )
2155  {
2156    for ( final IncludeDescriptor include : includes )
2157    {
2158      final String classname = include.actualTypeName();
2159      final TypeElement element = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( classname );
2160      assert null != element;
2161      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) )
2162      {
2163        FragmentDescriptor fragment = _registry.findFragmentByClassName( classname );
2164        if ( null == fragment )
2165        {
2166          fragment = deriveFragmentDescriptor( element );
2167          if ( null != fragment )
2168          {
2169            _registry.registerFragment( fragment );
2170          }
2171        }
2172        assert null != fragment;
2173        registerAutoDiscoveredFragment( graph, fragment );
2174      }
2175      else
2176      {
2177        assert AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME );
2178        InjectableDescriptor injectable = _registry.findInjectableByClassName( classname );
2179        if ( null == injectable )
2180        {
2181          injectable = deriveInjectableDescriptor( element );
2182          if ( null != injectable )
2183          {
2184            _registry.registerInjectable( injectable );
2185          }
2186        }
2187        assert null != injectable;
2188        graph.registerInjectable( injectable );
2189      }
2190    }
2191  }
2192
2193  private void verifyAutoDiscoverProviderPublishesType( @Nonnull final Coordinate coordinate,
2194                                                        @Nonnull final TypeElement providerType,
2195                                                        @Nonnull final Collection<Binding> bindings,
2196                                                        @Nonnull final WorkEntry workEntry )
2197  {
2198    final boolean matches =
2199      bindings.stream().flatMap( b -> b.getPublishedServices().stream() ).anyMatch( s -> coordinate.equals(
2200        s.getCoordinate() ) );
2201    if ( !matches )
2202    {
2203      throw new ProcessorException( buildAutoDiscoverProviderError( coordinate,
2204                                                                    workEntry,
2205                                                                    "the provider class " +
2206                                                                    providerType.getQualifiedName() +
2207                                                                    " does not publish the service " +
2208                                                                    coordinate +
2209                                                                    " for the framework type " +
2210                                                                    coordinate.type() +
2211                                                                    ". The provider must publish the framework type with the default qualifier" ),
2212                                    workEntry.getEntry().edge().getServiceRequest().getElement() );
2213    }
2214  }
2215
2216  @Nonnull
2217  private String buildAutoDiscoverProviderError( @Nonnull final Coordinate coordinate,
2218                                                 @Nonnull final WorkEntry workEntry,
2219                                                 @Nonnull final String detail )
2220  {
2221    return MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTOR_CLASSNAME,
2222                                 "contain a non-optional dependency " + coordinate +
2223                                 " that can not be auto-discovered via " +
2224                                 MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.STING_PROVIDER_CLASSNAME ) +
2225                                 " because " + detail + ".\nDependency Path:\n" + workEntry.describePathFromRoot() );
2226  }
2227
2228  private void emitFragmentJsonDescriptor( @Nonnull final FragmentDescriptor fragment )
2229    throws IOException
2230  {
2231    if ( _emitJsonDescriptors )
2232    {
2233      final TypeElement element = fragment.getElement();
2234      final String filename = toFilename( element ) + JSON_SUFFIX;
2235      JsonUtil.writeJsonResource( processingEnv, element, filename, fragment::write );
2236    }
2237  }
2238
2239  private void processProvidesMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement element,
2240                                      @Nonnull final Map<ExecutableElement, Binding> bindings,
2241                                      @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
2242  {
2243    if ( TypeKind.VOID == method.getReturnType().getKind() )
2244    {
2245      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
2246                                                       "only contain methods that return a value" ),
2247                                    method );
2248    }
2249    if ( !method.getTypeParameters().isEmpty() )
2250    {
2251      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
2252                                                          "contain methods with a type parameter" ),
2253                                    method );
2254    }
2255    if ( !method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.DEFAULT ) )
2256    {
2257      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
2258                                                       "only contain methods with a default modifier" ),
2259                                    method );
2260    }
2261    final boolean nullablePresent = AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( method );
2262    if ( nullablePresent && method.getReturnType().getKind().isPrimitive() )
2263    {
2264      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) +
2265                                    " contains a method that is incorrectly annotated with " +
2266                                    MemberChecks.toSimpleName( AnnotationsUtil.NULLABLE_CLASSNAME ) +
2267                                    " as the return type is a primitive value",
2268                                    method );
2269    }
2270    final List<? extends AnnotationMirror> scopedAnnotations = getScopedAnnotations( method );
2271    if ( !scopedAnnotations.isEmpty() )
2272    {
2273      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
2274                                                          "contain a method that is annotated with an " +
2275                                                          "annotation that is annotated with the " +
2276                                                          Constants.JSR_330_SCOPE_CLASSNAME +
2277                                                          " annotation such as " + scopedAnnotations ),
2278                                    method );
2279    }
2280
2281    final boolean eager = AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.EAGER_CLASSNAME );
2282
2283    final List<ServiceRequest> dependencies = new ArrayList<>();
2284    int index = 0;
2285    final List<? extends TypeMirror> parameterTypes = ( (ExecutableType) method.asType() ).getParameterTypes();
2286    for ( final VariableElement parameter : method.getParameters() )
2287    {
2288      dependencies.add( processFragmentServiceParameter( parameter, parameterTypes.get( index ) ) );
2289      index++;
2290    }
2291
2292    final AnnotationMirror annotation = AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME );
2293    final AnnotationValue value =
2294      null != annotation ? AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationValue( annotation, "value" ) : null;
2295
2296    final String qualifier = getQualifier( method );
2297    if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.JSR_330_NAMED_CLASSNAME ) )
2298    {
2299      final String message =
2300        MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
2301                              "contain a method annotated with the " + Constants.JSR_330_NAMED_CLASSNAME +
2302                              " annotation. Use the " + Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME + " annotation instead" );
2303      throw new ProcessorException( message, method );
2304    }
2305    if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.CDI_TYPED_CLASSNAME ) )
2306    {
2307      final String message =
2308        MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
2309                              "contain a method annotated with the " + Constants.CDI_TYPED_CLASSNAME +
2310                              " annotation. Use the " + Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME + " annotation instead" );
2311      throw new ProcessorException( message, method );
2312    }
2313
2314    @SuppressWarnings( "unchecked" )
2315    final List<TypeMirror> types =
2316      null == value ?
2317      Collections.singletonList( method.getReturnType() ) :
2318      ( (List<AnnotationValue>) value.getValue() )
2319        .stream()
2320        .map( v -> (TypeMirror) v.getValue() )
2321        .toList();
2322
2323    final ServiceSpec[] specs = new ServiceSpec[ types.size() ];
2324    for ( int i = 0; i < specs.length; i++ )
2325    {
2326      final TypeMirror type = types.get( i );
2327      if ( !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( method.getReturnType(), type ) )
2328      {
2329        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) +
2330                                      " specified a type that is not assignable to the return type of the method",
2331                                      element,
2332                                      annotation,
2333                                      value );
2334      }
2335      else if ( TypeKind.DECLARED == type.getKind() && isParameterized( (DeclaredType) type ) )
2336      {
2337        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) +
2338                                      " specified a type that is a a parameterized type",
2339                                      element,
2340                                      annotation,
2341                                      value );
2342      }
2343      specs[ i ] = new ServiceSpec( new Coordinate( qualifier, type ), nullablePresent );
2344    }
2345
2346    if ( 0 == specs.length && !eager )
2347    {
2348      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
2349                                                          "contain methods that specify zero types with the " +
2350                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) +
2351                                                          " annotation and are not annotated with the " +
2352                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.EAGER_CLASSNAME ) +
2353                                                          " annotation otherwise the component can not be created by " +
2354                                                          "the injector" ),
2355                                    element );
2356    }
2357    if ( 0 == specs.length && !qualifier.isEmpty() )
2358    {
2359      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
2360                                                          "contain methods that specify zero types with the " +
2361                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) +
2362                                                          " annotation and specify a qualifier with the " +
2363                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME ) +
2364                                                          " annotation as the qualifier is meaningless" ),
2365                                    element );
2366    }
2367
2368    final Binding binding =
2369      new Binding( Binding.Kind.PROVIDES,
2370                   element.getQualifiedName() + "#" + method.getSimpleName(),
2371                   Arrays.asList( specs ),
2372                   eager,
2373                   method,
2374                   dependencies.toArray( new ServiceRequest[ 0 ] ) );
2375    processInterceptorBindings( binding, method );
2376    bindings.put( method, binding );
2377  }
2378
2379  private void processInterceptorBindings( @Nonnull final Binding binding, @Nonnull final Element bindingSource )
2380  {
2381    for ( final ServiceSpec service : binding.getPublishedServices() )
2382    {
2383      final List<InterceptorBindingDescriptor> serviceBindings = new ArrayList<>();
2384      final TypeMirror serviceType = service.getCoordinate().type();
2385      TypeElement serviceElement = null;
2386      if ( TypeKind.DECLARED == serviceType.getKind() )
2387      {
2388        serviceElement = (TypeElement) ( (DeclaredType) serviceType ).asElement();
2389        for ( final AnnotationMirror annotation : findInterceptorBindingAnnotations( serviceElement ) )
2390        {
2391          serviceBindings.add( createInterceptorBindingDescriptor( binding, service, annotation, serviceElement ) );
2392        }
2393      }
2394      if ( Binding.Kind.INPUT != binding.getKind() )
2395      {
2396        for ( final AnnotationMirror annotation : findInterceptorBindingAnnotations( bindingSource ) )
2397        {
2398          serviceBindings.add( createInterceptorBindingDescriptor( binding, service, annotation, bindingSource ) );
2399        }
2400      }
2401      if ( !serviceBindings.isEmpty() )
2402      {
2403        validateInterceptedService( binding, service, serviceElement, serviceBindings, bindingSource );
2404        resolvePluginClaims( serviceBindings );
2405        resolveGenericInterceptors( serviceBindings );
2406        binding.addInterceptedService( new InterceptedServiceDescriptor( binding, service, serviceBindings ) );
2407      }
2408    }
2409  }
2410
2411  @Nonnull
2412  private List<AnnotationMirror> findInterceptorBindingAnnotations( @Nonnull final Element element )
2413  {
2414    final List<AnnotationMirror> annotations = new ArrayList<>();
2415    for ( final AnnotationMirror annotation : element.getAnnotationMirrors() )
2416    {
2417      if ( null != findInterceptorBindingMetaAnnotation( annotation ) )
2418      {
2419        annotations.add( annotation );
2420      }
2421    }
2422    return annotations;
2423  }
2424
2425  @Nullable
2426  private AnnotationMirror findInterceptorBindingMetaAnnotation( @Nonnull final AnnotationMirror annotation )
2427  {
2428    return annotation.getAnnotationType()
2429      .asElement()
2430      .getAnnotationMirrors()
2431      .stream()
2432      .filter( a -> Constants.INTERCEPTOR_BINDING_SIMPLE_NAME.contentEquals( a.getAnnotationType()
2433                                                                               .asElement()
2434                                                                               .getSimpleName() ) )
2435      .findAny()
2436      .orElse( null );
2437  }
2438
2439  @Nonnull
2440  private InterceptorBindingDescriptor createInterceptorBindingDescriptor( @Nonnull final Binding binding,
2441                                                                          @Nonnull final ServiceSpec service,
2442                                                                          @Nonnull final AnnotationMirror annotation,
2443                                                                          @Nonnull final Element usageElement )
2444  {
2445    final AnnotationMirror metaAnnotation = Objects.requireNonNull( findInterceptorBindingMetaAnnotation( annotation ) );
2446    validateInterceptorBindingAnnotationType( annotation, metaAnnotation, usageElement );
2447    final TypeElement annotationType = (TypeElement) annotation.getAnnotationType().asElement();
2448    final Map<? extends ExecutableElement, ? extends AnnotationValue> metaValues =
2449      processingEnv.getElementUtils().getElementValuesWithDefaults( metaAnnotation );
2450    final AnnotationValue priorityValue = findAnnotationValueByName( metaValues, "priority" );
2451    final AnnotationValue implementedByValue = findAnnotationValueByName( metaValues, "implementedBy" );
2452    final int priority = (Integer) Objects.requireNonNull( priorityValue ).getValue();
2453    final String implementedBy =
2454      null == implementedByValue ? "" : (String) implementedByValue.getValue();
2455    final Map<String, BindingValueModelImpl> values = extractBindingValues( annotation );
2456    return new InterceptorBindingDescriptor( binding,
2457                                             service,
2458                                             annotation,
2459                                             annotationType,
2460                                             usageElement,
2461                                             priority,
2462                                             implementedBy,
2463                                             values );
2464  }
2465
2466  private void validateInterceptorBindingAnnotationType( @Nonnull final AnnotationMirror annotation,
2467                                                         @Nonnull final AnnotationMirror metaAnnotation,
2468                                                         @Nonnull final Element usageElement )
2469  {
2470    final TypeElement annotationType = (TypeElement) annotation.getAnnotationType().asElement();
2471    if ( hasSourceRetention( annotationType ) )
2472    {
2473      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor binding annotation " + annotationType.getQualifiedName() +
2474                                    " must not use @Retention(SOURCE)",
2475                                    usageElement,
2476                                    annotation );
2477    }
2478    final Map<? extends ExecutableElement, ? extends AnnotationValue> metaValues =
2479      processingEnv.getElementUtils().getElementValuesWithDefaults( metaAnnotation );
2480    final AnnotationValue priorityValue = findAnnotationValueByName( metaValues, "priority" );
2481    if ( null == priorityValue || !( priorityValue.getValue() instanceof Integer ) )
2482    {
2483      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor binding meta-annotation on " + annotationType.getQualifiedName() +
2484                                    " must declare an int priority member",
2485                                    usageElement,
2486                                    annotation );
2487    }
2488    final AnnotationValue implementedByValue = findAnnotationValueByName( metaValues, "implementedBy" );
2489    if ( null != implementedByValue && !( implementedByValue.getValue() instanceof String ) )
2490    {
2491      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor binding meta-annotation on " + annotationType.getQualifiedName() +
2492                                    " must declare a String implementedBy member when present",
2493                                    usageElement,
2494                                    annotation );
2495    }
2496    final String implementedBy =
2497      null == implementedByValue ? "" : (String) implementedByValue.getValue();
2498    if ( !implementedBy.isEmpty() )
2499    {
2500      validateImplementedByName( implementedBy, usageElement, annotation );
2501    }
2502  }
2503
2504  private boolean hasSourceRetention( @Nonnull final TypeElement annotationType )
2505  {
2506    final AnnotationMirror retention =
2507      AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( annotationType, Retention.class.getName() );
2508    if ( null == retention )
2509    {
2510      return false;
2511    }
2512    final AnnotationValue value = AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationValue( retention, "value" );
2513    return null != value && "SOURCE".equals( value.getValue().toString() );
2514  }
2515
2516  @Nullable
2517  private AnnotationValue findAnnotationValueByName(
2518    @Nonnull final Map<? extends ExecutableElement, ? extends AnnotationValue> values,
2519    @Nonnull final String name )
2520  {
2521    return values
2522      .entrySet()
2523      .stream()
2524      .filter( e -> e.getKey().getSimpleName().contentEquals( name ) )
2525      .map( Map.Entry::getValue )
2526      .findAny()
2527      .orElse( null );
2528  }
2529
2530  @Nonnull
2531  private Map<String, BindingValueModelImpl> extractBindingValues( @Nonnull final AnnotationMirror annotation )
2532  {
2533    final Map<String, BindingValueModelImpl> values = new LinkedHashMap<>();
2534    for ( final Map.Entry<? extends ExecutableElement, ? extends AnnotationValue> entry :
2535      processingEnv.getElementUtils().getElementValuesWithDefaults( annotation ).entrySet() )
2536    {
2537      final String name = entry.getKey().getSimpleName().toString();
2538      values.put( name, toBindingValueModel( name, entry.getValue().getValue() ) );
2539    }
2540    return values;
2541  }
2542
2543  @Nonnull
2544  private BindingValueModelImpl toBindingValueModel( @Nonnull final String name, @Nullable final Object value )
2545  {
2546    if ( value instanceof String )
2547    {
2548      return new BindingValueModelImpl( name,
2549                                        BindingValueKind.STRING,
2550                                        value,
2551                                        null,
2552                                        null,
2553                                        null,
2554                                        com.palantir.javapoet.CodeBlock.of( "$S", value ).toString() );
2555    }
2556    else if ( value instanceof Boolean )
2557    {
2558      return new BindingValueModelImpl( name,
2559                                        BindingValueKind.BOOLEAN,
2560                                        value,
2561                                        null,
2562                                        null,
2563                                        null,
2564                                        value.toString() );
2565    }
2566    else if ( value instanceof Byte )
2567    {
2568      return new BindingValueModelImpl( name,
2569                                        BindingValueKind.BYTE,
2570                                        value,
2571                                        null,
2572                                        null,
2573                                        null,
2574                                        "(byte) " + value );
2575    }
2576    else if ( value instanceof Short )
2577    {
2578      return new BindingValueModelImpl( name,
2579                                        BindingValueKind.SHORT,
2580                                        value,
2581                                        null,
2582                                        null,
2583                                        null,
2584                                        "(short) " + value );
2585    }
2586    else if ( value instanceof Integer )
2587    {
2588      return new BindingValueModelImpl( name, BindingValueKind.INT, value, null, null, null, value.toString() );
2589    }
2590    else if ( value instanceof Long )
2591    {
2592      return new BindingValueModelImpl( name, BindingValueKind.LONG, value, null, null, null, value + "L" );
2593    }
2594    else if ( value instanceof Float )
2595    {
2596      return new BindingValueModelImpl( name, BindingValueKind.FLOAT, value, null, null, null, value + "F" );
2597    }
2598    else if ( value instanceof Double )
2599    {
2600      return new BindingValueModelImpl( name, BindingValueKind.DOUBLE, value, null, null, null, value.toString() );
2601    }
2602    else if ( value instanceof Character )
2603    {
2604      return new BindingValueModelImpl( name,
2605                                        BindingValueKind.CHAR,
2606                                        value,
2607                                        null,
2608                                        null,
2609                                        null,
2610                                        com.palantir.javapoet.CodeBlock.of( "$L", "'" + value + "'" ).toString() );
2611    }
2612    else if ( value instanceof TypeMirror )
2613    {
2614      final String className = value.toString();
2615      return new BindingValueModelImpl( name,
2616                                        BindingValueKind.CLASS,
2617                                        null,
2618                                        className,
2619                                        null,
2620                                        null,
2621                                        com.palantir.javapoet.CodeBlock.of( "$S", className ).toString() );
2622    }
2623    else if ( value instanceof VariableElement )
2624    {
2625      final VariableElement enumValue = (VariableElement) value;
2626      final String enumTypeName = ( (TypeElement) enumValue.getEnclosingElement() ).getQualifiedName().toString();
2627      final String constantName = enumValue.getSimpleName().toString();
2628      return new BindingValueModelImpl( name,
2629                                        BindingValueKind.ENUM,
2630                                        null,
2631                                        null,
2632                                        enumTypeName,
2633                                        constantName,
2634                                        com.palantir.javapoet.CodeBlock.of( "$S", constantName ).toString() );
2635    }
2636    else
2637    {
2638      return new BindingValueModelImpl( name, BindingValueKind.UNSUPPORTED, null, null, null, null, "<unsupported>" );
2639    }
2640  }
2641
2642  private void validateInterceptedService( @Nonnull final Binding binding,
2643                                           @Nonnull final ServiceSpec service,
2644                                           @Nullable final TypeElement serviceElement,
2645                                           @Nonnull final List<InterceptorBindingDescriptor> interceptors,
2646                                           @Nonnull final Element bindingSource )
2647  {
2648    if ( Binding.Kind.INPUT == binding.getKind() )
2649    {
2650      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor bindings on injector input services are not supported in v1",
2651                                    binding.getElement() );
2652    }
2653    if ( service.isOptional() || binding.isOptional() )
2654    {
2655      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor bindings on nullable or optional provider bindings are not supported in v1",
2656                                    bindingSource );
2657    }
2658    if ( null == serviceElement )
2659    {
2660      throw new ProcessorException( "Intercepted bindings must publish service interfaces only",
2661                                    bindingSource );
2662    }
2663    if ( Object.class.getName().equals( serviceElement.getQualifiedName().toString() ) )
2664    {
2665      throw new ProcessorException( "Intercepted bindings must not publish java.lang.Object",
2666                                    bindingSource );
2667    }
2668    if ( ElementKind.INTERFACE != serviceElement.getKind() )
2669    {
2670      throw new ProcessorException( "Intercepted bindings must publish service interfaces only",
2671                                    bindingSource );
2672    }
2673    if ( !serviceElement.getTypeParameters().isEmpty() )
2674    {
2675      throw new ProcessorException( "Intercepted service interfaces must not declare type parameters",
2676                                    serviceElement );
2677    }
2678    for ( final ExecutableElement method :
2679      ElementsUtil.getMethods( serviceElement, processingEnv.getElementUtils(), processingEnv.getTypeUtils() ) )
2680    {
2681      if ( !method.getTypeParameters().isEmpty() )
2682      {
2683        throw new ProcessorException( "Intercepted service methods must not declare type parameters", method );
2684      }
2685      if ( !findInterceptorBindingAnnotations( method ).isEmpty() )
2686      {
2687        throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor bindings on service interface methods are not supported in v1",
2688                                      method );
2689      }
2690    }
2691    if ( Binding.Kind.INJECTABLE == binding.getKind() )
2692    {
2693      for ( final Element enclosedElement : bindingSource.getEnclosedElements() )
2694      {
2695        if ( ElementKind.METHOD == enclosedElement.getKind() &&
2696             !findInterceptorBindingAnnotations( enclosedElement ).isEmpty() )
2697        {
2698          throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor bindings on implementation methods are not supported in v1",
2699                                        enclosedElement );
2700        }
2701      }
2702    }
2703    final Set<String> types = new HashSet<>();
2704    final Set<Integer> priorities = new HashSet<>();
2705    for ( final InterceptorBindingDescriptor interceptor : interceptors )
2706    {
2707      if ( !types.add( interceptor.annotationTypeName() ) )
2708      {
2709        throw new ProcessorException( "Duplicate interceptor binding annotation type " +
2710                                      interceptor.annotationTypeName() + " for service " +
2711                                      service.getCoordinate(),
2712                                      interceptor.getUsageElement(),
2713                                      interceptor.getAnnotation() );
2714      }
2715      if ( !priorities.add( interceptor.priority() ) )
2716      {
2717        throw new ProcessorException( "Duplicate interceptor priority " + interceptor.priority() +
2718                                      " for service " + service.getCoordinate(),
2719                                      interceptor.getUsageElement(),
2720                                      interceptor.getAnnotation() );
2721      }
2722    }
2723  }
2724
2725  private void resolvePluginClaims( @Nonnull final List<InterceptorBindingDescriptor> interceptors )
2726  {
2727    for ( final InterceptorBindingDescriptor interceptor : interceptors )
2728    {
2729      final List<String> pluginIds = new ArrayList<>();
2730      for ( final InterceptorCodeGenerator generator : _interceptorCodeGenerators )
2731      {
2732        if ( generator.supports( interceptor ) )
2733        {
2734          pluginIds.add( pluginId( generator ) );
2735        }
2736      }
2737      if ( pluginIds.size() > 1 )
2738      {
2739        interceptor.setConflict( pluginIds );
2740        throw new ProcessorException( "Multiple interceptor plugins claim " + interceptor.annotationTypeName() +
2741                                      " for service " + interceptor.getService().getCoordinate() + ": " +
2742                                      String.join( ", ", interceptor.getPluginIds() ),
2743                                      interceptor.getUsageElement(),
2744                                      interceptor.getAnnotation() );
2745      }
2746      else if ( 1 == pluginIds.size() )
2747      {
2748        interceptor.setClaimedBy( pluginIds.get( 0 ) );
2749      }
2750    }
2751  }
2752
2753  @Nonnull
2754  private String pluginId( @Nonnull final InterceptorCodeGenerator generator )
2755  {
2756    final String canonicalName = generator.getClass().getCanonicalName();
2757    return null == canonicalName ? generator.getClass().getName() : canonicalName;
2758  }
2759
2760  private void resolveGenericInterceptors( @Nonnull final List<InterceptorBindingDescriptor> interceptors )
2761  {
2762    for ( final InterceptorBindingDescriptor interceptor : interceptors )
2763    {
2764      if ( InterceptorBindingDescriptor.ClaimState.CLAIMED == interceptor.getClaimState() )
2765      {
2766        continue;
2767      }
2768      if ( interceptor.getImplementedBy().isEmpty() )
2769      {
2770        throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor binding " + interceptor.annotationTypeName() +
2771                                      " must specify implementedBy or be claimed by exactly one plugin",
2772                                      interceptor.getUsageElement(),
2773                                      interceptor.getAnnotation() );
2774      }
2775      interceptor.setInterceptor( resolveGenericInterceptor( interceptor ) );
2776    }
2777  }
2778
2779  @Nonnull
2780  private InterceptorDescriptor resolveGenericInterceptor( @Nonnull final InterceptorBindingDescriptor interceptor )
2781  {
2782    final String classname = interceptor.getImplementedBy();
2783    final InterceptorDescriptor existing = _registry.findInterceptorByClassName( classname );
2784    if ( null != existing )
2785    {
2786      return existing;
2787    }
2788    final TypeElement element = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( classname );
2789    if ( null == element )
2790    {
2791      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor implementation " + classname + " does not exist",
2792                                    interceptor.getUsageElement(),
2793                                    interceptor.getAnnotation() );
2794    }
2795    if ( !ElementsUtil.isEffectivelyPublic( element ) )
2796    {
2797      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor implementation " + classname + " must be effectively public",
2798                                    element );
2799    }
2800    if ( !AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) )
2801    {
2802      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor implementation " + classname + " must be annotated with " +
2803                                    MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ),
2804                                    element );
2805    }
2806    InjectableDescriptor injectable = _registry.findInjectableByClassName( classname );
2807    if ( null == injectable )
2808    {
2809      injectable = deriveInjectableDescriptor( element );
2810      if ( null == injectable )
2811      {
2812        throw new ProcessorException( "Unable to derive interceptor implementation " + classname, element );
2813      }
2814      _registry.registerInjectable( injectable );
2815    }
2816    final InterceptorDescriptor descriptor =
2817      new InterceptorDescriptor( element, validateLifecycleMethods( element, interceptor ), injectable.getBinding() );
2818    _registry.registerInterceptor( descriptor );
2819    return descriptor;
2820  }
2821
2822  @Nonnull
2823  private Map<InterceptorPhase, InterceptorMethodDescriptor> validateLifecycleMethods(
2824    @Nonnull final TypeElement element,
2825    @Nonnull final InterceptorBindingDescriptor interceptor )
2826  {
2827    final Map<InterceptorPhase, InterceptorMethodDescriptor> methods = new EnumMap<>( InterceptorPhase.class );
2828    for ( final Element enclosedElement : element.getEnclosedElements() )
2829    {
2830      if ( ElementKind.METHOD == enclosedElement.getKind() )
2831      {
2832        final ExecutableElement method = (ExecutableElement) enclosedElement;
2833        final List<InterceptorPhase> phases = lifecyclePhases( method );
2834        if ( phases.size() > 1 )
2835        {
2836          throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor lifecycle method must not have multiple lifecycle annotations",
2837                                        method );
2838        }
2839        else if ( 1 == phases.size() )
2840        {
2841          final InterceptorPhase phase = phases.get( 0 );
2842          validateLifecycleMethodShape( method );
2843          final InterceptorMethodDescriptor descriptor =
2844            new InterceptorMethodDescriptor( phase, method, validateLifecycleParameters( method, phase, interceptor ) );
2845          if ( null != methods.put( phase, descriptor ) )
2846          {
2847            throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor implementation " + element.getQualifiedName() +
2848                                          " must declare at most one " + phase + " lifecycle method",
2849                                          method );
2850          }
2851        }
2852      }
2853    }
2854    if ( methods.isEmpty() )
2855    {
2856      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor implementation " + element.getQualifiedName() +
2857                                    " must declare at least one lifecycle method",
2858                                    element );
2859    }
2860    validateNoInheritedLifecycleMethods( element );
2861    return methods;
2862  }
2863
2864  @Nonnull
2865  private List<InterceptorPhase> lifecyclePhases( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
2866  {
2867    final List<InterceptorPhase> phases = new ArrayList<>();
2868    if ( hasAnnotationOfTypeOrSimpleName( method, Constants.INTERCEPTOR_BEFORE_CLASSNAME, Constants.INTERCEPTOR_BEFORE_SIMPLE_NAME ) )
2869    {
2870      phases.add( InterceptorPhase.BEFORE );
2871    }
2872    if ( hasAnnotationOfTypeOrSimpleName( method, Constants.INTERCEPTOR_AFTER_CLASSNAME, Constants.INTERCEPTOR_AFTER_SIMPLE_NAME ) )
2873    {
2874      phases.add( InterceptorPhase.AFTER );
2875    }
2876    if ( hasAnnotationOfTypeOrSimpleName( method,
2877                                          Constants.INTERCEPTOR_AFTER_EXCEPTION_CLASSNAME,
2878                                          Constants.INTERCEPTOR_AFTER_EXCEPTION_SIMPLE_NAME ) )
2879    {
2880      phases.add( InterceptorPhase.AFTER_EXCEPTION );
2881    }
2882    return phases;
2883  }
2884
2885  private boolean hasAnnotationOfTypeOrSimpleName( @Nonnull final Element element,
2886                                                   @Nonnull final String classname,
2887                                                   @Nonnull final String simpleName )
2888  {
2889    return element
2890      .getAnnotationMirrors()
2891      .stream()
2892      .anyMatch( a -> classname.equals( ( (TypeElement) a.getAnnotationType().asElement() ).getQualifiedName()
2893        .toString() ) ||
2894                      simpleName.contentEquals( a.getAnnotationType().asElement().getSimpleName() ) );
2895  }
2896
2897  private void validateLifecycleMethodShape( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
2898  {
2899    final Set<Modifier> modifiers = method.getModifiers();
2900    if ( !modifiers.contains( Modifier.PUBLIC ) ||
2901         modifiers.contains( Modifier.STATIC ) ||
2902         modifiers.contains( Modifier.PRIVATE ) ||
2903         modifiers.contains( Modifier.PROTECTED ) )
2904    {
2905      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor lifecycle methods must be public instance methods", method );
2906    }
2907    if ( TypeKind.VOID != method.getReturnType().getKind() )
2908    {
2909      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor lifecycle methods must return void", method );
2910    }
2911    if ( !method.getTypeParameters().isEmpty() )
2912    {
2913      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor lifecycle methods must not declare type parameters", method );
2914    }
2915    for ( final TypeMirror thrownType : method.getThrownTypes() )
2916    {
2917      if ( !isUncheckedThrowable( thrownType ) )
2918      {
2919        throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor lifecycle methods must not declare checked exceptions", method );
2920      }
2921    }
2922  }
2923
2924  private boolean isUncheckedThrowable( @Nonnull final TypeMirror type )
2925  {
2926    final TypeElement runtimeException = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( RuntimeException.class.getName() );
2927    final TypeElement error = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( Error.class.getName() );
2928    return processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( type, runtimeException.asType() ) ||
2929           processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( type, error.asType() );
2930  }
2931
2932  private void validateNoInheritedLifecycleMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
2933  {
2934    validateNoInheritedLifecycleMethods( element, element );
2935  }
2936
2937  private void validateNoInheritedLifecycleMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement element,
2938                                                    @Nonnull final TypeElement type )
2939  {
2940    for ( final TypeMirror supertype : processingEnv.getTypeUtils().directSupertypes( type.asType() ) )
2941    {
2942      if ( TypeKind.DECLARED == supertype.getKind() )
2943      {
2944        final TypeElement superElement = (TypeElement) ( (DeclaredType) supertype ).asElement();
2945        if ( Object.class.getName().equals( superElement.getQualifiedName().toString() ) )
2946        {
2947          continue;
2948        }
2949        for ( final Element member : superElement.getEnclosedElements() )
2950        {
2951          if ( ElementKind.METHOD == member.getKind() )
2952          {
2953            final ExecutableElement method = (ExecutableElement) member;
2954            if ( !lifecyclePhases( method ).isEmpty() )
2955            {
2956              final ExecutableElement override = findDeclaredOverride( element, method );
2957              if ( null == override || lifecyclePhases( override ).isEmpty() )
2958              {
2959                throw new ProcessorException( "Inherited interceptor lifecycle annotations are not supported in v1",
2960                                              element );
2961              }
2962            }
2963          }
2964        }
2965        validateNoInheritedLifecycleMethods( element, superElement );
2966      }
2967    }
2968  }
2969
2970  @Nullable
2971  private ExecutableElement findDeclaredOverride( @Nonnull final TypeElement element,
2972                                                  @Nonnull final ExecutableElement inheritedMethod )
2973  {
2974    for ( final Element enclosedElement : element.getEnclosedElements() )
2975    {
2976      if ( ElementKind.METHOD == enclosedElement.getKind() )
2977      {
2978        final ExecutableElement method = (ExecutableElement) enclosedElement;
2979        if ( processingEnv.getElementUtils().overrides( method, inheritedMethod, element ) )
2980        {
2981          return method;
2982        }
2983      }
2984    }
2985    return null;
2986  }
2987
2988  @Nonnull
2989  private List<LifecycleParameterDescriptor> validateLifecycleParameters( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method,
2990                                                                          @Nonnull final InterceptorPhase phase,
2991                                                                          @Nonnull final InterceptorBindingDescriptor interceptor )
2992  {
2993    final List<LifecycleParameterDescriptor> parameters = new ArrayList<>();
2994    for ( final VariableElement parameter : method.getParameters() )
2995    {
2996      parameters.add( validateLifecycleParameter( parameter, phase, interceptor ) );
2997    }
2998    return parameters;
2999  }
3000
3001  @Nonnull
3002  private LifecycleParameterDescriptor validateLifecycleParameter( @Nonnull final VariableElement parameter,
3003                                                                  @Nonnull final InterceptorPhase phase,
3004                                                                  @Nonnull final InterceptorBindingDescriptor interceptor )
3005  {
3006    final List<AnnotationMirror> markers = new ArrayList<>();
3007    for ( final AnnotationMirror annotation : parameter.getAnnotationMirrors() )
3008    {
3009      if ( isLifecycleMarker( annotation ) )
3010      {
3011        markers.add( annotation );
3012      }
3013    }
3014    if ( markers.isEmpty() )
3015    {
3016      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor lifecycle parameters must have exactly one marker annotation",
3017                                    parameter );
3018    }
3019    if ( markers.size() > 1 )
3020    {
3021      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor lifecycle parameters must not have multiple marker annotations",
3022                                    parameter );
3023    }
3024    final AnnotationMirror marker = markers.get( 0 );
3025    final String markerType = ( (TypeElement) marker.getAnnotationType().asElement() ).getQualifiedName().toString();
3026    final TypeMirror type = parameter.asType();
3027    if ( Constants.INTERCEPTOR_SERVICE_TYPE_CLASSNAME.equals( markerType ) )
3028    {
3029      requireType( parameter, type, String.class.getName(), "@ServiceType" );
3030      return new LifecycleParameterDescriptor( LifecycleParameterDescriptor.Kind.SERVICE_TYPE, "" );
3031    }
3032    else if ( Constants.INTERCEPTOR_METHOD_NAME_CLASSNAME.equals( markerType ) )
3033    {
3034      requireType( parameter, type, String.class.getName(), "@MethodName" );
3035      return new LifecycleParameterDescriptor( LifecycleParameterDescriptor.Kind.METHOD_NAME, "" );
3036    }
3037    else if ( Constants.INTERCEPTOR_ARGUMENTS_CLASSNAME.equals( markerType ) )
3038    {
3039      if ( TypeKind.ARRAY != type.getKind() || !"java.lang.Object[]".equals( type.toString() ) )
3040      {
3041        throw new ProcessorException( "@Arguments lifecycle parameter must have type Object[]", parameter );
3042      }
3043      return new LifecycleParameterDescriptor( LifecycleParameterDescriptor.Kind.ARGUMENTS, "" );
3044    }
3045    else if ( Constants.INTERCEPTOR_RESULT_CLASSNAME.equals( markerType ) )
3046    {
3047      if ( InterceptorPhase.AFTER != phase )
3048      {
3049        throw new ProcessorException( "@Result lifecycle parameter is only valid on @After methods", parameter );
3050      }
3051      requireType( parameter, type, Object.class.getName(), "@Result" );
3052      return new LifecycleParameterDescriptor( LifecycleParameterDescriptor.Kind.RESULT, "" );
3053    }
3054    else if ( Constants.INTERCEPTOR_THROWN_CLASSNAME.equals( markerType ) )
3055    {
3056      if ( InterceptorPhase.AFTER_EXCEPTION != phase )
3057      {
3058        throw new ProcessorException( "@Thrown lifecycle parameter is only valid on @AfterException methods",
3059                                      parameter );
3060      }
3061      requireType( parameter, type, Throwable.class.getName(), "@Thrown" );
3062      return new LifecycleParameterDescriptor( LifecycleParameterDescriptor.Kind.THROWN, "" );
3063    }
3064    else
3065    {
3066      assert Constants.INTERCEPTOR_BINDING_VALUE_CLASSNAME.equals( markerType );
3067      final String name = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( marker, "value" );
3068      validateBindingValueParameter( parameter, type, interceptor, name );
3069      return new LifecycleParameterDescriptor( LifecycleParameterDescriptor.Kind.BINDING_VALUE, name );
3070    }
3071  }
3072
3073  private boolean isLifecycleMarker( @Nonnull final AnnotationMirror annotation )
3074  {
3075    final String classname = ( (TypeElement) annotation.getAnnotationType().asElement() ).getQualifiedName().toString();
3076    return Constants.INTERCEPTOR_SERVICE_TYPE_CLASSNAME.equals( classname ) ||
3077           Constants.INTERCEPTOR_METHOD_NAME_CLASSNAME.equals( classname ) ||
3078           Constants.INTERCEPTOR_BINDING_VALUE_CLASSNAME.equals( classname ) ||
3079           Constants.INTERCEPTOR_ARGUMENTS_CLASSNAME.equals( classname ) ||
3080           Constants.INTERCEPTOR_RESULT_CLASSNAME.equals( classname ) ||
3081           Constants.INTERCEPTOR_THROWN_CLASSNAME.equals( classname );
3082  }
3083
3084  private void requireType( @Nonnull final Element element,
3085                            @Nonnull final TypeMirror actualType,
3086                            @Nonnull final String expectedTypeName,
3087                            @Nonnull final String markerName )
3088  {
3089    final TypeElement expected = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( expectedTypeName );
3090    if ( null == expected || !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isSameType( actualType, expected.asType() ) )
3091    {
3092      throw new ProcessorException( markerName + " lifecycle parameter must have type " + expectedTypeName, element );
3093    }
3094  }
3095
3096  private void validateBindingValueParameter( @Nonnull final VariableElement parameter,
3097                                              @Nonnull final TypeMirror type,
3098                                              @Nonnull final InterceptorBindingDescriptor interceptor,
3099                                              @Nonnull final String name )
3100  {
3101    final BindingValueModelImpl value = interceptor.values().get( name );
3102    if ( null == value )
3103    {
3104      throw new ProcessorException( "@BindingValue references unknown interceptor binding member " + name, parameter );
3105    }
3106    if ( BindingValueKind.UNSUPPORTED == value.kind() )
3107    {
3108      throw new ProcessorException( "@BindingValue member " + name + " has an unsupported v1 value type", parameter );
3109    }
3110    if ( BindingValueKind.STRING == value.kind() ||
3111         BindingValueKind.ENUM == value.kind() ||
3112         BindingValueKind.CLASS == value.kind() )
3113    {
3114      requireType( parameter, type, String.class.getName(), "@BindingValue" );
3115    }
3116    else if ( !isPrimitiveOrBoxedMatch( type, value.kind() ) )
3117    {
3118      throw new ProcessorException( "@BindingValue member " + name +
3119                                    " is not compatible with lifecycle parameter type " + type,
3120                                    parameter );
3121    }
3122  }
3123
3124  private boolean isPrimitiveOrBoxedMatch( @Nonnull final TypeMirror type, @Nonnull final BindingValueKind kind )
3125  {
3126    final String name = type.toString();
3127    return switch ( kind )
3128      {
3129        case BOOLEAN -> "boolean".equals( name ) || Boolean.class.getName().equals( name );
3130        case BYTE -> "byte".equals( name ) || Byte.class.getName().equals( name );
3131        case SHORT -> "short".equals( name ) || Short.class.getName().equals( name );
3132        case INT -> "int".equals( name ) || Integer.class.getName().equals( name );
3133        case LONG -> "long".equals( name ) || Long.class.getName().equals( name );
3134        case FLOAT -> "float".equals( name ) || Float.class.getName().equals( name );
3135        case DOUBLE -> "double".equals( name ) || Double.class.getName().equals( name );
3136        case CHAR -> "char".equals( name ) || Character.class.getName().equals( name );
3137        default -> false;
3138      };
3139  }
3140
3141  private void validateImplementedByName( @Nonnull final String name,
3142                                          @Nonnull final Element element,
3143                                          @Nonnull final AnnotationMirror annotation )
3144  {
3145    if ( name.contains( "$" ) || !isDottedJavaName( name ) )
3146    {
3147      throw new ProcessorException( "implementedBy must be a canonical dotted qualified Java name",
3148                                    element,
3149                                    annotation );
3150    }
3151  }
3152
3153  private boolean isDottedJavaName( @Nonnull final String name )
3154  {
3155    if ( name.isEmpty() || name.startsWith( "." ) || name.endsWith( "." ) || name.contains( ".." ) )
3156    {
3157      return false;
3158    }
3159    for ( final String part : name.split( "\\." ) )
3160    {
3161      if ( part.isEmpty() || !SourceVersion.isIdentifier( part ) || SourceVersion.isKeyword( part ) )
3162      {
3163        return false;
3164      }
3165    }
3166    return true;
3167  }
3168
3169  @Nonnull
3170  private ServiceRequest processFragmentServiceParameter( @Nonnull final VariableElement parameter,
3171                                                          @Nonnull final TypeMirror type )
3172  {
3173    if ( TypesUtil.containsArrayType( type ) )
3174    {
3175      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
3176                                                          "contain a method with a parameter that contains an array type" ),
3177                                    parameter );
3178    }
3179    else if ( TypesUtil.containsWildcard( type ) )
3180    {
3181      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
3182                                                          "contain a method with a parameter that contains a wildcard type parameter" ),
3183                                    parameter );
3184    }
3185    else if ( TypesUtil.containsRawType( type ) )
3186    {
3187      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
3188                                                          "contain a method with a parameter that contains a raw type" ),
3189                                    parameter );
3190    }
3191    else
3192    {
3193      TypeMirror dependencyType = null;
3194      ServiceRequest.Kind kind = null;
3195      for ( final ServiceRequest.Kind candidate : ServiceRequest.Kind.values() )
3196      {
3197        dependencyType = candidate.extractType( type );
3198        if ( null != dependencyType )
3199        {
3200          kind = candidate;
3201          break;
3202        }
3203      }
3204      if ( null == kind )
3205      {
3206        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
3207                                                            "contain a method with a parameter that contains an unexpected parameterized type. Only parameterized types known to the framework are supported" ),
3208                                      parameter );
3209      }
3210      else
3211      {
3212        final boolean optional = AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( parameter );
3213        if ( optional && ServiceRequest.Kind.INSTANCE != kind )
3214        {
3215          throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
3216                                                              "contain a method with a parameter annotated with the " +
3217                                                              MemberChecks.toSimpleName( AnnotationsUtil.NULLABLE_CLASSNAME ) +
3218                                                              " annotation that is not an instance dependency kind" ),
3219                                        parameter );
3220        }
3221        final String qualifier = getQualifier( parameter );
3222        if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( parameter, Constants.JSR_330_NAMED_CLASSNAME ) )
3223        {
3224          final String message =
3225            MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
3226                                  "contain a method with a parameter annotated with the " +
3227                                  Constants.JSR_330_NAMED_CLASSNAME + " annotation. Use the " +
3228                                  Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME + " annotation instead" );
3229          throw new ProcessorException( message, parameter );
3230        }
3231        final Coordinate coordinate = new Coordinate( qualifier, dependencyType );
3232        final ServiceSpec service = new ServiceSpec( coordinate, optional );
3233        return new ServiceRequest( kind, service, parameter );
3234      }
3235    }
3236  }
3237
3238  private void processInjectable( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
3239  {
3240    debug( () -> "Processing Injectable: " + element );
3241    if ( ElementKind.CLASS != element.getKind() )
3242    {
3243      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME, "be a class" ),
3244                                    element );
3245    }
3246    else if ( element.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.ABSTRACT ) )
3247    {
3248      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME, "be abstract" ),
3249                                    element );
3250    }
3251    else if ( ElementsUtil.isNonStaticNestedClass( element ) )
3252    {
3253      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3254                                                          "be a non-static nested class" ),
3255                                    element );
3256    }
3257    else if ( !element.getTypeParameters().isEmpty() )
3258    {
3259      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME, "have type parameters" ),
3260                                    element );
3261    }
3262    final List<ExecutableElement> constructors = ElementsUtil.getConstructors( element );
3263    final ExecutableElement constructor = constructors.get( 0 );
3264    if ( constructors.size() > 1 )
3265    {
3266      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3267                                                          "have multiple constructors" ),
3268                                    element );
3269    }
3270    injectableConstructorShouldNotBeProtected( constructor );
3271    injectableConstructorShouldNotBePublic( constructor );
3272    injectableShouldNotHaveScopedAnnotation( element );
3273
3274    final boolean eager = AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.EAGER_CLASSNAME );
3275
3276    final List<ServiceRequest> dependencies = new ArrayList<>();
3277    int index = 0;
3278    final List<? extends TypeMirror> parameterTypes = ( (ExecutableType) constructor.asType() ).getParameterTypes();
3279    for ( final VariableElement parameter : constructor.getParameters() )
3280    {
3281      dependencies.add( handleConstructorParameter( parameter, parameterTypes.get( index ) ) );
3282      index++;
3283    }
3284
3285    final AnnotationMirror annotation =
3286      AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( element, Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME );
3287    final AnnotationValue value =
3288      null != annotation ? AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationValue( annotation, "value" ) : null;
3289
3290    final String qualifier = getQualifier( element );
3291    if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.JSR_330_NAMED_CLASSNAME ) &&
3292         ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( element, Constants.WARNING_JSR_330_NAMED ) )
3293    {
3294      final String message =
3295        MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3296                              "be annotated with the " + Constants.JSR_330_NAMED_CLASSNAME + " annotation. " +
3297                              "Use the " + Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME + " annotation instead. " +
3298                              MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_JSR_330_NAMED ) );
3299      warning( message, element );
3300    }
3301    if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.CDI_TYPED_CLASSNAME ) &&
