3302         ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( element, Constants.WARNING_CDI_TYPED ) )
3303    {
3304      final String message =
3305        MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3306                              "be annotated with the " + Constants.CDI_TYPED_CLASSNAME + " annotation. " +
3307                              "Use the " + Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME + " annotation instead. " +
3308                              MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_CDI_TYPED ) );
3309      warning( message, element );
3310    }
3311    if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( constructor, Constants.JSR_330_INJECT_CLASSNAME ) &&
3312         ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( constructor, Constants.WARNING_JSR_330_INJECT ) )
3313    {
3314      final String message =
3315        MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3316                              "be annotated with the " + Constants.JSR_330_INJECT_CLASSNAME + " annotation. " +
3317                              MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_JSR_330_INJECT ) );
3318      warning( message, constructor );
3319    }
3320    @SuppressWarnings( "unchecked" )
3321    final List<TypeMirror> types =
3322      null == value ?
3323      Collections.singletonList( element.asType() ) :
3324      ( (List<AnnotationValue>) value.getValue() )
3325        .stream()
3326        .map( v -> (TypeMirror) v.getValue() )
3327        .toList();
3328
3329    final ServiceSpec[] specs = new ServiceSpec[ types.size() ];
3330    for ( int i = 0; i < specs.length; i++ )
3331    {
3332      final TypeMirror type = types.get( i );
3333      if ( !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( element.asType(), type ) )
3334      {
3335        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) +
3336                                      " specified a type that is not assignable to the declaring type",
3337                                      element,
3338                                      annotation,
3339                                      value );
3340      }
3341      else if ( TypeKind.DECLARED == type.getKind() && isParameterized( (DeclaredType) type ) )
3342      {
3343        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) +
3344                                      " specified a type that is a a parameterized type",
3345                                      element,
3346                                      annotation,
3347                                      value );
3348      }
3349      specs[ i ] = new ServiceSpec( new Coordinate( qualifier, type ), false );
3350    }
3351
3352    if ( 0 == specs.length && !eager )
3353    {
3354      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3355                                                          "specify zero types with the " +
3356                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) +
3357                                                          " annotation or must be annotated with the " +
3358                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.EAGER_CLASSNAME ) +
3359                                                          " annotation otherwise the component can not be created by the injector" ),
3360                                    element );
3361    }
3362    if ( 0 == specs.length && !qualifier.isEmpty() )
3363    {
3364      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3365                                                          "specify zero types with the " +
3366                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) +
3367                                                          " annotation and specify a qualifier with the " +
3368                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME ) +
3369                                                          " annotation as the qualifier is meaningless" ),
3370                                    element );
3371    }
3372
3373    final Binding binding =
3374      new Binding( Binding.Kind.INJECTABLE,
3375                   element.getQualifiedName().toString(),
3376                   Arrays.asList( specs ),
3377                   eager,
3378                   constructor,
3379                   dependencies.toArray( new ServiceRequest[ 0 ] ) );
3380    processInterceptorBindings( binding, element );
3381    final InjectableDescriptor injectable = new InjectableDescriptor( binding );
3382    _registry.registerInjectable( injectable );
3383  }
3384
3385  @Nonnull
3386  private FactoryMethodDescriptor processFactoryMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement factory,
3387                                                        @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method,
3388                                                        @Nonnull final List<FactoryDependencyDescriptor> dependencies,
3389                                                        @Nonnull final Set<String> usedFieldNames )
3390  {
3391    if ( !findInterceptorBindingAnnotations( method ).isEmpty() )
3392    {
3393      throw new ProcessorException( "Interceptor bindings on non-fragment methods are not supported in v1",
3394                                    method );
3395    }
3396    if ( TypeKind.VOID == method.getReturnType().getKind() )
3397    {
3398      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3399                                                       "only contain abstract methods that return a value" ),
3400                                    method );
3401    }
3402    else if ( !method.getTypeParameters().isEmpty() )
3403    {
3404      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3405                                                          "contain abstract methods with a type parameter" ),
3406                                    method );
3407    }
3408    else if ( !method.getThrownTypes().isEmpty() )
3409    {
3410      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3411                                                          "contain abstract methods that throw exceptions" ),
3412                                    method );
3413    }
3414    else if ( TypeKind.DECLARED != method.getReturnType().getKind() )
3415    {
3416      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3417                                                       "contain abstract methods that return a class type" ),
3418                                    method );
3419    }
3420
3421    final DeclaredType returnType = (DeclaredType) method.getReturnType();
3422    if ( !returnType.getTypeArguments().isEmpty() )
3423    {
3424      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3425                                                          "contain abstract methods that return a parameterized type" ),
3426                                    method );
3427    }
3428
3429    final TypeElement producedType = (TypeElement) returnType.asElement();
3430    if ( ElementKind.CLASS != producedType.getKind() )
3431    {
3432      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3433                                                       "contain abstract methods that return a class type" ),
3434                                    method );
3435    }
3436    else if ( producedType.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.ABSTRACT ) )
3437    {
3438      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3439                                                          "contain abstract methods that return an abstract class" ),
3440                                    method );
3441    }
3442    else if ( ElementsUtil.isNonStaticNestedClass( producedType ) )
3443    {
3444      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3445                                                          "contain abstract methods that return a non-static nested class" ),
3446                                    method );
3447    }
3448    else if ( !producedType.getTypeParameters().isEmpty() )
3449    {
3450      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3451                                                          "contain abstract methods that return a class with type parameters" ),
3452                                    method );
3453    }
3454
3455    final List<ExecutableElement> constructors = ElementsUtil.getConstructors( producedType );
3456    if ( 1 != constructors.size() )
3457    {
3458      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3459                                                       "create types with a single accessible constructor" ),
3460                                    method );
3461    }
3462    final ExecutableElement constructor = constructors.get( 0 );
3463    if ( !isFactoryAccessible( factory, constructor ) )
3464    {
3465      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3466                                                       "create types with a constructor accessible from the factory interface" ),
3467                                    method );
3468    }
3469
3470    final List<? extends VariableElement> constructorParameters = constructor.getParameters();
3471    final List<? extends VariableElement> methodParameters = method.getParameters();
3472    final Map<Integer, VariableElement> methodParametersByConstructorIndex = new LinkedHashMap<>();
3473    final Map<Integer, FactoryDependencyDescriptor> dependenciesByConstructorIndex = new LinkedHashMap<>();
3474    final List<? extends TypeMirror> constructorParameterTypes =
3475      ( (ExecutableType) constructor.asType() ).getParameterTypes();
3476
3477    for ( final VariableElement parameter : methodParameters )
3478    {
3479      boolean matched = false;
3480      for ( int i = 0; i < constructorParameters.size(); i++ )
3481      {
3482        final VariableElement constructorParameter = constructorParameters.get( i );
3483        if ( constructorParameter.getSimpleName().contentEquals( parameter.getSimpleName() ) )
3484        {
3485          matched = true;
3486          if ( methodParametersByConstructorIndex.containsKey( i ) )
3487          {
3488            throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3489                                                                "contain duplicate abstract method parameters that " +
3490                                                                "match the same constructor parameter" ),
3491                                          parameter );
3492          }
3493          if ( !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isSameType( parameter.asType(), constructorParameterTypes.get( i ) ) )
3494          {
3495            throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3496                                                             "contain abstract method parameters whose name and type " +
3497                                                             "match the created type constructor parameter" ),
3498                                          parameter );
3499          }
3500          methodParametersByConstructorIndex.put( i, parameter );
3501          break;
3502        }
3503      }
3504      if ( !matched )
3505      {
3506        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.FACTORY_CLASSNAME,
3507                                                         "contain abstract method parameters whose name and type " +
3508                                                         "match the created type constructor parameter" ),
3509                                      parameter );
3510      }
3511    }
3512
3513    for ( int i = 0; i < constructorParameters.size(); i++ )
3514    {
3515      if ( !methodParametersByConstructorIndex.containsKey( i ) )
3516      {
3517        final VariableElement constructorParameter = constructorParameters.get( i );
3518        final ServiceRequest request = handleConstructorParameter( constructorParameter, constructorParameterTypes.get( i ) );
3519        final FactoryDependencyDescriptor dependency =
3520          findOrCreateFactoryDependency( request, dependencies, usedFieldNames );
3521        dependenciesByConstructorIndex.put( i, dependency );
3522      }
3523    }
3524
3525    return new FactoryMethodDescriptor( method,
3526                                        producedType.asType(),
3527                                        constructor,
3528                                        constructorParameters,
3529                                        methodParametersByConstructorIndex,
3530                                        dependenciesByConstructorIndex );
3531  }
3532
3533  @Nonnull
3534  private FactoryDependencyDescriptor findOrCreateFactoryDependency( @Nonnull final ServiceRequest request,
3535                                                                     @Nonnull final List<FactoryDependencyDescriptor> dependencies,
3536                                                                     @Nonnull final Set<String> usedFieldNames )
3537  {
3538    for ( final FactoryDependencyDescriptor existing : dependencies )
3539    {
3540      if ( existing.matches( request ) )
3541      {
3542        return existing;
3543      }
3544    }
3545
3546    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement) request.getElement();
3547    final String parameterName = parameter.getSimpleName().toString();
3548    final String fieldName = uniqueFactoryFieldName( parameterName, usedFieldNames );
3549    final FactoryDependencyDescriptor dependency =
3550      new FactoryDependencyDescriptor( request, parameterName, fieldName );
3551    dependencies.add( dependency );
3552    return dependency;
3553  }
3554
3555  @Nonnull
3556  private String uniqueFactoryFieldName( @Nonnull final String parameterName, @Nonnull final Set<String> usedFieldNames )
3557  {
3558    final String baseName = StingGeneratorUtil.FRAMEWORK_PREFIX + parameterName;
3559    String candidate = baseName;
3560    int index = 2;
3561    while ( !usedFieldNames.add( candidate ) )
3562    {
3563      candidate = baseName + index;
3564      index++;
3565    }
3566    return candidate;
3567  }
3568
3569  private boolean isFactoryAccessible( @Nonnull final TypeElement factory, @Nonnull final ExecutableElement constructor )
3570  {
3571    final Set<Modifier> modifiers = constructor.getModifiers();
3572    if ( modifiers.contains( Modifier.PRIVATE ) )
3573    {
3574      return false;
3575    }
3576    else if ( modifiers.contains( Modifier.PUBLIC ) )
3577    {
3578      return true;
3579    }
3580    else
3581    {
3582      final String factoryPackage = GeneratorUtil.getQualifiedPackageName( factory );
3583      final String targetPackage =
3584        GeneratorUtil.getQualifiedPackageName( (TypeElement) constructor.getEnclosingElement() );
3585      return factoryPackage.equals( targetPackage );
3586    }
3587  }
3588
3589  // Binary descriptor writing and verification removed
3590
3591  private void emitInjectableJsonDescriptor( @Nonnull final InjectableDescriptor injectable )
3592    throws IOException
3593  {
3594    if ( _emitJsonDescriptors )
3595    {
3596      final TypeElement element = injectable.getElement();
3597      final String filename = toFilename( element ) + JSON_SUFFIX;
3598      JsonUtil.writeJsonResource( processingEnv, element, filename, injectable::write );
3599    }
3600  }
3601
3602  @Nonnull
3603  private String toFilename( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement )
3604  {
3605    return GeneratorUtil.getGeneratedClassName( typeElement, "", "" ).toString().replace( ".", "/" );
3606  }
3607
3608  @Nonnull
3609  private ServiceRequest handleConstructorParameter( @Nonnull final VariableElement parameter,
3610                                                     @Nonnull final TypeMirror type )
3611  {
3612    if ( TypesUtil.containsArrayType( type ) )
3613    {
3614      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3615                                                          "contain a constructor with a parameter that contains an array type" ),
3616                                    parameter );
3617    }
3618    else if ( TypesUtil.containsWildcard( type ) )
3619    {
3620      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3621                                                          "contain a constructor with a parameter that contains a wildcard type parameter" ),
3622                                    parameter );
3623    }
3624    else if ( TypesUtil.containsRawType( type ) )
3625    {
3626      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3627                                                          "contain a constructor with a parameter that contains a raw type" ),
3628                                    parameter );
3629    }
3630    else
3631    {
3632      TypeMirror dependencyType = null;
3633      ServiceRequest.Kind kind = null;
3634      for ( final ServiceRequest.Kind candidate : ServiceRequest.Kind.values() )
3635      {
3636        dependencyType = candidate.extractType( type );
3637        if ( null != dependencyType )
3638        {
3639          kind = candidate;
3640          break;
3641        }
3642      }
3643      if ( null == kind )
3644      {
3645        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3646                                                            "contain a constructor with a parameter that contains an unexpected parameterized type. Only parameterized types known to the framework are supported" ),
3647                                      parameter );
3648      }
3649      else
3650      {
3651        final boolean optional = AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( parameter );
3652        if ( optional && ServiceRequest.Kind.INSTANCE != kind )
3653        {
3654          throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3655                                                              "contain a constructor with a parameter annotated with " +
3656                                                              MemberChecks.toSimpleName( AnnotationsUtil.NULLABLE_CLASSNAME ) +
3657                                                              " that is not an instance dependency kind" ),
3658                                        parameter );
3659        }
3660        final String qualifier = getQualifier( parameter );
3661        if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( parameter, Constants.JSR_330_NAMED_CLASSNAME ) &&
3662             ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( parameter, Constants.WARNING_JSR_330_NAMED ) )
3663        {
3664          final String message =
3665            MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3666                                  "contain a constructor with a parameter annotated with the " +
3667                                  Constants.JSR_330_NAMED_CLASSNAME + " annotation. Use the " +
3668                                  Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME + " annotation instead. " +
3669                                  MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_JSR_330_NAMED ) );
3670          warning( message, parameter );
3671        }
3672        final Coordinate coordinate = new Coordinate( qualifier, dependencyType );
3673        final ServiceSpec service = new ServiceSpec( coordinate, optional );
3674        return new ServiceRequest( kind, service, parameter );
3675      }
3676    }
3677  }
3678
3679  @Nonnull
3680  private String getQualifier( @Nonnull final Element element )
3681  {
3682    final AnnotationMirror annotation = AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( element, Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME );
3683    return null == annotation ? "" : AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( annotation, "value" );
3684  }
3685
3686  private void injectableShouldNotHaveScopedAnnotation( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
3687  {
3688    final List<? extends AnnotationMirror> scopedAnnotations = getScopedAnnotations( element );
3689    if ( !scopedAnnotations.isEmpty() &&
3690         ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( element, Constants.WARNING_JSR_330_SCOPED ) )
3691    {
3692      final String message =
3693        MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3694                                "be annotated with an annotation that is annotated with the " +
3695                                Constants.JSR_330_SCOPE_CLASSNAME + " annotation such as " + scopedAnnotations + ". " +
3696                                MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_JSR_330_SCOPED ) );
3697      warning( message, element );
3698    }
3699  }
3700
3701  private void injectableConstructorShouldNotBePublic( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement constructor )
3702  {
3703    if ( Elements.Origin.EXPLICIT == processingEnv.getElementUtils().getOrigin( constructor ) &&
3704         constructor.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PUBLIC ) &&
3705         ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( constructor, Constants.WARNING_PUBLIC_CONSTRUCTOR ) )
3706    {
3707      final String message =
3708        MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3709                                "have a public constructor. The type is instantiated by the injector " +
3710                                "and should have a package-access constructor. " +
3711                                MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_PUBLIC_CONSTRUCTOR ) );
3712      warning( message, constructor );
3713    }
3714  }
3715
3716  private void injectableConstructorShouldNotBeProtected( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement constructor )
3717  {
3718    if ( constructor.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PROTECTED ) &&
3719         ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( constructor, Constants.WARNING_PROTECTED_CONSTRUCTOR ) )
3720    {
3721      final String message =
3722        MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3723                                "have a protected constructor. The type is instantiated by the " +
3724                                "injector and should have a package-access constructor. " +
3725                                MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_PROTECTED_CONSTRUCTOR ) );
3726      warning( message, constructor );
3727    }
3728  }
3729
3730  private boolean isParameterized( @Nonnull final DeclaredType nestedParameterType )
3731  {
3732    return !( (TypeElement) nestedParameterType.asElement() ).getTypeParameters().isEmpty();
3733  }
3734
3735  @Nonnull
3736  private List<? extends AnnotationMirror> getScopedAnnotations( @Nonnull final Element element )
3737  {
3738    return element
3739      .getAnnotationMirrors()
3740      .stream()
3741      .filter( a -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( a.getAnnotationType().asElement(),
3742                                                         Constants.JSR_330_SCOPE_CLASSNAME ) )
3743      .collect( Collectors.toList() );
3744  }
3745
3746  @Nullable
3747  private FragmentDescriptor deriveFragmentDescriptor( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
3748  {
3749    final String classname = element.getQualifiedName().toString();
3750    final FragmentDescriptor cached = _derivedFragmentCache.get( classname );
3751    if ( null != cached )
3752    {
3753      return cached;
3754    }
3755    // Only derive for proper @Fragment types
3756    else if ( ElementKind.INTERFACE != element.getKind() ||
3757              !AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) )
3758    {
3759      return null;
3760    }
3761    else if ( !SuperficialValidation.validateElement( processingEnv, element ) )
3762    {
3763      return null;
3764    }
3765    else
3766    {
3767      final boolean localOnly = extractFragmentLocalOnly( element );
3768      final List<IncludeDescriptor> includes = extractIncludes( element, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME, false );
3769      final Map<ExecutableElement, Binding> bindings = new LinkedHashMap<>();
3770      for ( final Element enclosedElement : element.getEnclosedElements() )
3771      {
3772        if ( ElementKind.METHOD == enclosedElement.getKind() )
3773        {
3774          processProvidesMethod( element, bindings, (ExecutableElement) enclosedElement );
3775        }
3776      }
3777      final FragmentDescriptor fragment = new FragmentDescriptor( element, includes, localOnly, bindings.values() );
3778      fragment.markJavaStubAsGenerated();
3779      _derivedFragmentCache.put( classname, fragment );
3780      return fragment;
3781    }
3782  }
3783
3784  private boolean extractFragmentLocalOnly( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
3785  {
3786    return (boolean) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME, "localOnly" )
3787      .getValue();
3788  }
3789
3790  private boolean isInSamePackage( @Nonnull final TypeElement type1, @Nonnull final TypeElement type2 )
3791  {
3792    return GeneratorUtil.getQualifiedPackageName( type1 ).equals( GeneratorUtil.getQualifiedPackageName( type2 ) );
3793  }
3794
3795  @Nullable
3796  private InjectableDescriptor deriveInjectableDescriptor( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
3797  {
3798    final String classname = element.getQualifiedName().toString();
3799    final InjectableDescriptor cached = _derivedInjectableCache.get( classname );
3800    if ( null != cached )
3801    {
3802      return cached;
3803    }
3804    // Only derive for proper @Injectable types
3805    if ( ElementKind.CLASS != element.getKind() ||
3806         !AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) )
3807    {
3808      return null;
3809    }
3810
3811    if ( element.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.ABSTRACT ) ||
3812         ElementsUtil.isNonStaticNestedClass( element ) ||
3813         !element.getTypeParameters().isEmpty() )
3814    {
3815      // Invalid injectable; let normal processing flag this if encountered as source.
3816      return null;
3817    }
3818
3819    final List<ExecutableElement> constructors = ElementsUtil.getConstructors( element );
3820    if ( constructors.isEmpty() )
3821    {
3822      return null;
3823    }
3824    final ExecutableElement constructor = constructors.get( 0 );
3825    if ( constructors.size() > 1 )
3826    {
3827      return null;
3828    }
3829
3830    final boolean eager = AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.EAGER_CLASSNAME );
3831
3832    final List<ServiceRequest> dependencies = new ArrayList<>();
3833    int index = 0;
3834    final List<? extends TypeMirror> parameterTypes = ( (ExecutableType) constructor.asType() ).getParameterTypes();
3835    for ( final VariableElement parameter : constructor.getParameters() )
3836    {
3837      dependencies.add( handleConstructorParameter( parameter, parameterTypes.get( index ) ) );
3838      index++;
3839    }
3840
3841    final AnnotationMirror annotation =
3842      AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( element, Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME );
3843    final AnnotationValue value =
3844      null != annotation ? AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationValue( annotation, "value" ) : null;
3845
3846    final String qualifier = getQualifier( element );
3847
3848    @SuppressWarnings( "unchecked" )
3849    final List<TypeMirror> types =
3850      null == value ?
3851      Collections.singletonList( element.asType() ) :
3852      ( (List<AnnotationValue>) value.getValue() )
3853        .stream()
3854        .map( v -> (TypeMirror) v.getValue() )
3855        .toList();
3856
3857    final ServiceSpec[] specs = new ServiceSpec[ types.size() ];
3858    for ( int i = 0; i < specs.length; i++ )
3859    {
3860      final TypeMirror type = types.get( i );
3861      if ( !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( element.asType(), type ) )
3862      {
3863        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) +
3864                                      " specified a type that is not assignable to the declaring type",
3865                                      element,
3866                                      annotation,
3867                                      value );
3868      }
3869      else if ( TypeKind.DECLARED == type.getKind() && isParameterized( (DeclaredType) type ) )
3870      {
3871        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) +
3872                                      " specified a type that is a a parameterized type",
3873                                      element,
3874                                      annotation,
3875                                      value );
3876      }
3877      specs[ i ] = new ServiceSpec( new Coordinate( qualifier, type ), false );
3878    }
3879
3880    if ( 0 == specs.length && !eager )
3881    {
3882      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3883                                                          "specify zero types with the " +
3884                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) +
3885                                                          " annotation or must be annotated with the " +
3886                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.EAGER_CLASSNAME ) +
3887                                                          " annotation otherwise the component can not be created by the injector" ),
3888                                    element );
3889    }
3890    if ( 0 == specs.length && !qualifier.isEmpty() )
3891    {
3892      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME,
3893                                                          "specify zero types with the " +
3894                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.TYPED_CLASSNAME ) +
3895                                                          " annotation and specify a qualifier with the " +
3896                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.NAMED_CLASSNAME ) +
3897                                                          " annotation as the qualifier is meaningless" ),
3898                                    element );
3899    }
3900
3901    final Binding binding =
3902      new Binding( Binding.Kind.INJECTABLE,
3903                   element.getQualifiedName().toString(),
3904                   Arrays.asList( specs ),
3905                   eager,
3906                   constructor,
3907                   dependencies.toArray( new ServiceRequest[ 0 ] ) );
3908    final InjectableDescriptor injectable = new InjectableDescriptor( binding );
3909    injectable.markJavaStubAsGenerated();
3910    _derivedInjectableCache.put( classname, injectable );
3911    return injectable;
3912  }
3913
3914  private void maybeWarnOnRedundantDirectInjectableInclude( @Nonnull final TypeElement originator,
3915                                                            @Nonnull final String annotationClassname,
3916                                                            @Nonnull final Collection<IncludeDescriptor> includes )
3917  {
3918    if ( !ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( originator,
3919                                               Constants.WARNING_REDUNDANT_DIRECT_INJECTABLE_INCLUDE ) )
3920    {
3921      return;
3922    }
3923
3924    final Set<String> directInjectables = new HashSet<>();
3925    final Set<String> transitiveInjectables = new HashSet<>();
3926
3927    for ( final IncludeDescriptor include : includes )
3928    {
3929      final String classname = include.actualTypeName();
3930      final TypeElement element = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( classname );
3931      if ( null == element )
3932      {
3933        continue;
3934      }
3935      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) )
3936      {
3937        // Only consider explicit direct includes as candidates (for Injector, auto-includes are not considered direct)
3938        if ( !include.auto() )
3939        {
3940          directInjectables.add( classname );
3941        }
3942      }
3943      else if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) )
3944      {
3945        collectTransitiveInjectablesFromFragment( classname, transitiveInjectables, new HashSet<>() );
3946      }
3947    }
3948
3949    directInjectables.retainAll( transitiveInjectables );
3950    if ( !directInjectables.isEmpty() )
3951    {
3952      for ( final String classname : directInjectables )
3953      {
3954        final String message =
3955          MemberChecks.shouldNot( annotationClassname,
3956                                  "include type " + classname +
3957                                  " as it is already transitively included via included fragments. " +
3958                                  MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_REDUNDANT_DIRECT_INJECTABLE_INCLUDE ) );
3959        warning( message, originator );
3960      }
3961    }
3962  }
3963
3964  private void collectTransitiveInjectablesFromFragment( @Nonnull final String fragmentClassname,
3965                                                         @Nonnull final Set<String> collector,
3966                                                         @Nonnull final Set<String> visitedFragments )
3967  {
3968    if ( !visitedFragments.add( fragmentClassname ) )
3969    {
3970      return;
3971    }
3972    final FragmentDescriptor fragment = _registry.findFragmentByClassName( fragmentClassname );
3973    if ( null == fragment )
3974    {
3975      return;
3976    }
3977    for ( final IncludeDescriptor include : fragment.getIncludes() )
3978    {
3979      final String classname = include.actualTypeName();
3980      final TypeElement element = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( classname );
3981      if ( null == element )
3982      {
3983        continue;
3984      }
3985      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME ) )
3986      {
3987        collector.add( classname );
3988      }
3989      else if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) )
3990      {
3991        collectTransitiveInjectablesFromFragment( classname, collector, visitedFragments );
3992      }
3993    }
3994  }
3995
3996  private void maybeWarnOnFragmentIncludeCycle( @Nonnull final TypeElement originator,
3997                                                @Nonnull final Collection<IncludeDescriptor> includes )
3998  {
3999    if ( !ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( originator, Constants.WARNING_FRAGMENT_INCLUDE_CYCLE ) )
4000    {
4001      return;
4002    }
4003    final String originClassname = originator.getQualifiedName().toString();
4004    for ( final IncludeDescriptor include : includes )
4005    {
4006      final String classname = include.actualTypeName();
4007      final TypeElement element = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( classname );
4008      if ( null == element )
4009      {
4010        continue;
4011      }
4012      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) )
4013      {
4014        if ( fragmentTransitivelyIncludes( classname, originClassname, new HashSet<>() ) )
4015        {
4016          final String message =
4017            MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME,
4018                                    "include a fragment " + classname +
4019                                    " that transitively includes " + originClassname + ". " +
4020                                    MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_FRAGMENT_INCLUDE_CYCLE ) );
4021          warning( message, originator );
4022          return;
4023        }
4024      }
4025    }
4026  }
4027
4028  private boolean fragmentTransitivelyIncludes( @Nonnull final String fragmentClassname,
4029                                                @Nonnull final String targetFragmentClassname,
4030                                                @Nonnull final Set<String> visited )
4031  {
4032    if ( !visited.add( fragmentClassname ) )
4033    {
4034      return false;
4035    }
4036    if ( fragmentClassname.equals( targetFragmentClassname ) )
4037    {
4038      return true;
4039    }
4040    final FragmentDescriptor fragment = _registry.findFragmentByClassName( fragmentClassname );
4041    if ( null == fragment )
4042    {
4043      return false;
4044    }
4045    for ( final IncludeDescriptor include : fragment.getIncludes() )
4046    {
4047      final String classname = include.actualTypeName();
4048      final TypeElement element = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( classname );
4049      if ( null != element && AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.FRAGMENT_CLASSNAME ) )
4050      {
4051        if ( fragmentTransitivelyIncludes( classname, targetFragmentClassname, visited ) )
4052        {
4053          return true;
4054        }
4055      }
4056    }
4057    return false;
4058  }
4059}
